panels.description: Two cars side-by-side catch air over a rise; they land and side-bump sparks. Durango driver wears the eyepatch.
panels.description_es: Dos autos lado a lado toman aire sobre una elevación de la autopista; aterrizan y se chocan lateralmente produciendo chispas. El conductor del Durango lleva un parche en el ojo.
panels.action: Zoom in as the cars land and side-bump each other. Sparks fly and fill the frame.
panels.action_es: Zoom in cuando los autos aterrizan y se golpean lateralmente. Chispas vuelan y llenan el cuadro.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Sean in his Rover 6x6 is in hot pursuit!

panels.description: Rover 6x6 and Durango race toward expansive bridge over river. Inset: Narrow Bridge yellow sign. Push in on Rover.
panels.description_es: El Rover 6x6 y el Durango corren hacia un puente expansivo sobre un río. Inset: cartel amarillo de Puente Angosto. Push in sobre el Rover.
panels.action: The vibrating cars slide into frame neck and neck. Tire smoke trails them. The yellow Narrow Bridge sign moves off screen, revealing the narrow bridge. Push in on the Rover 6x6.
panels.action_es: Los autos vibrantes entran al cuadro par a par. Humo de neumáticos los sigue. El cartel amarillo de Puente Angosto sale de pantalla revelando el puente. Push in sobre el Rover 6x6.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): We can't let Von Steele escape to the city!

panels.description: Title card. Matchbox Crew logo with episode title zips into position.
panels.description_es: Placa de título. Logo de Matchbox Crew con el título del episodio.
panels.action: The title zips into position as Sean says the title.
panels.action_es: El título se desliza a su posición mientras Sean lo dice.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Dangerous Bridge High-Speed Chase!

panels.description: Five singles stack vertically to form split-screen of the whole team. Sean adds eyepatch (Von Steele) as 6th. Character names splash over each.
panels.description_es: Cinco singles se apilan verticalmente formando pantalla dividida del equipo. Sean agrega el parche (Von Steele) como 6to. Los nombres de los personajes aparecen sobre cada imagen.
panels.action: Five singles stack vertically to form a split-screen of the whole team. After a beat, the stack is squeezed tighter as Von Steele is added to the frame.
panels.action_es: Cinco singles se apilan verticalmente formando una pantalla dividida del equipo completo. Tras una pausa, la pila se comprime al agregar a Von Steele.

panels.description: Pro mechanic's garage converted into ultimate Matchbox play space. Table-sized city diorama with DIY bridge. Kids lean in; Sean pushes mini Rover and black Durango across bridge.
panels.description_es: Taller de mecánico profesional convertido en el espacio de juego Matchbox definitivo. Diorama de ciudad tamaño mesa con puente DIY. Los chicos observan; Sean empuja el Rover y el Durango negro por el puente.
panels.action: The pieces of the room build one piece at a time from all directions — walls, shelves, decoration, dioramas, kids!
panels.action_es: Las piezas de la habitación se construyen una por una desde todas las direcciones — paredes, estantes, decoración, dioramas, ¡chicos!
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): Whoa, Sean, who's that in the black car? / Sean (V.O.): It's super-spy criminal Von Steele!

panels.description: Sean now wearing an eyepatch. Durango in left hand stretched out in foreground, Rover in right hand behind. Foreshortened arm fills half the screen.
panels.description_es: Sean ahora con parche. Durango en mano izquierda extendida en primer plano, Rover en mano derecha detrás. El brazo escorzado llena la mitad de la pantalla.
panels.action: Sean's arm with the Durango stretches out into the foreground, foreshortened to take up half of the screen.
panels.action_es: El brazo de Sean con el Durango se extiende hacia el primer plano, escorzado para ocupar la mitad de la pantalla.
panels.voiceover: Sean (as Von Steele) (V.O.): Your Matchbox Crew is way too slow to ever catch Von Steele! (villain laugh)

panels.description: Kids line up four vehicles on bridge driving at Sean: Aimee-Mustang, Ted-Triumph, Crosby-Ford F-150, Charmaine-Porsche 911. Sean drives Rover + Durango head-on. Match-cut as cars pass.
panels.description_es: Los chicos alinean cuatro vehículos en el puente yendo hacia Sean: Aimee-Mustang, Ted-Triumph, Crosby-Ford F-150, Charmaine-Porsche 911. Sean conduce Rover + Durango de frente. Match-cut al cruzarse.
panels.action: Push in on the cars, controlled by the kids. They move the cars together in a row. Sean moves the Rover in the left lane and the Durango in the right lane towards the others moving towards him in the left lane.
panels.action_es: Push in sobre los autos controlados por los chicos. Los mueven juntos en fila. Sean mueve el Rover por el carril izquierdo y el Durango por el derecho hacia los demás que vienen de frente.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Aimee, Ted, Crosby, Charmaine, we have to make him— / Kids (V.O.): (honk honk, beep beep, watch out!)

panels.description: Over-the-shoulder of Rover. Rover swerves right lane behind Durango as Mustang/Triumph/F-150/Porsche race past in left lane. Motion blur, sun flares.
panels.description_es: Por encima del hombro del Rover. El Rover se desvía al carril derecho detrás del Durango mientras Mustang/Triumph/F-150/Porsche pasan por el carril izquierdo. Motion blur, destellos solares.
panels.action: Starting close to the Rover 6x6, track with the Rover as it moves towards camera into the right lane behind the Dodge Durango, just as the other cars race by in the left lane. Motion blur and sun flares.
panels.action_es: Arrancando cerca del Rover 6x6, seguimos al Rover mientras se mueve hacia cámara al carril derecho detrás del Durango, justo cuando los otros autos pasan por el carril izquierdo. Motion blur y destellos solares.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Sean swerves into the right lane just barely dodging the cars coming at him.

panels.description: Back of Durango fills panel, slightly airborne. Durango lands center frame on bridge, shocks bouncing, frame shaking.
panels.description_es: La parte trasera del Durango llena el panel, ligeramente en el aire. El Durango aterriza en el centro del cuadro sobre el puente, amortiguadores rebotando, cuadro temblando.
panels.action: The back of the Dodge Durango fills the panel and moves forward to reveal the bridge background. The Durango lands in the middle of the frame on the bridge, shocks bouncing, the frame shaking.
panels.action_es: La parte trasera del Durango llena el panel y avanza revelando el fondo del puente. El Durango aterriza en el centro del cuadro sobre el puente, amortiguadores rebotando, cuadro temblando.
panels.voiceover: Sean (as Von Steele) (V.O.): So long slowpoke!

panels.description: Straight front of Rover. Sean both hands on wheel, seatbelt on, exhilarated. Reflection of Durango's back on passenger-side panel. Rover leans L-R as it weaves.
panels.description_es: Frente del Rover de frente. Sean con ambas manos al volante, cinturón puesto, cara de entusiasmo. Reflejo de la parte trasera del Durango en el panel lateral. El Rover se mueve de lado a lado al esquivar.
panels.action: The Rover 6x6 shifts from side to side in the frame as Sean's hands and body lean left and right. Image slowly moves closer to the camera. The reflection of the Durango slides in and out as the Rover changes lanes.
panels.action_es: El Rover 6x6 se mueve de lado a lado mientras Sean se inclina izquierda y derecha. La imagen se acerca lentamente a cámara. El reflejo del Durango entra y sale al cambiar de carril.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): (narration) Sean stays right on Von Steele's tail! Dodging cars. Looking for an opening.

panels.description: Durango has significant lead on Rover. Light traffic. 180° clockwise y-axis rotation; Matchbox City silhouette resolves to detail in BG.
panels.description_es: El Durango lleva ventaja significativa sobre el Rover. Tráfico ligero. Rotación de 180° en eje Y en sentido horario; la silueta de Matchbox City se resuelve en detalle en el fondo.
panels.action: Pull out as the frame rotates 180 degrees clockwise on the y-axis. The Rover 6x6 and Dodge Durango move along the bridge, weaving around other cars. The silhouette of the Matchbox City changes from silhouette to detailed drawing.
panels.action_es: Pull out mientras el cuadro rota 180 grados en sentido horario sobre el eje Y. El Rover y el Durango avanzan por el puente esquivando autos. La silueta de Matchbox City pasa de silueta a dibujo detallado.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): If Von Steele reaches the city, he'll slip away to his secret hideout and we'll lose him!

panels.description: Split-screen 3/4 faces of Sean (gritted teeth) and Von Steele (head back laughing, eyepatch toward camera). Sweat flies, images shake.
panels.description_es: Pantalla dividida con caras 3/4 de Sean (dientes apretados) y Von Steele (cabeza hacia atrás riendo, parche hacia cámara). Sudor vuela, imágenes tiemblan.
panels.action: Sweat flies from their foreheads as the faces move towards the center panel divider. Images shake with the vibrations of moving cars.
panels.action_es: El sudor vuela de sus frentes mientras las caras se mueven hacia el divisor central del panel. Las imágenes tiemblan con las vibraciones de los autos en movimiento.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): I'll get you, Von Steele! / Sean (as Von Steele) (V.O.): Never! Haha!

panels.description: Crosby in Excavator cab foreground, hard hat on, surprised face. Durango and Rover racing side by side in BG. Pull back through cab to reveal Crosby.
panels.description_es: Crosby en cabina de la Excavadora en primer plano, casco puesto, cara de sorpresa. Durango y Rover corriendo lado a lado en el fondo. Pull back a través de la cabina para revelar a Crosby.
panels.action: Start on a CU of the Durango and the Rover side by side. As we pull back the Excavator slides in from the left to reveal Crosby. Crosby's eyebrows raise.
panels.action_es: Arrancamos en CU del Durango y el Rover lado a lado. Al alejarnos la Excavadora entra por la izquierda revelando a Crosby. Las cejas de Crosby se levantan.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): Sean! You have to slow down! / Kids (V.O.): (walla: what? Why? Slow down? Crosby must have a screw loose.)

panels.description: Aerial pan along bridge, vehicles near 1/3 mark toward city. Lens flares off shiny pristine arches. Match-dissolve to next.
panels.description_es: Vista aérea con paneo a lo largo del puente, vehículos cerca del tercio del camino hacia la ciudad. Destellos de lente sobre arcos brillantes. Match-dissolve al siguiente.
panels.action: Pan along the bridge as the cars move. Lens flares off the shiny, pristine arches and support columns.
panels.action_es: Paneo a lo largo del puente mientras los autos avanzan. Destellos de lente sobre los arcos y columnas de soporte brillantes y prístinos.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): No way, Crosby! I've almost got 'em!

panels.description: Same aerial as P14 but bridge is partially-built — construction materials, vehicles, missing sections, exposed sides. Match-dissolve transition.
panels.description_es: Misma toma aérea que P14 pero el puente está parcialmente construido — materiales de construcción, vehículos, secciones faltantes, laterales expuestos. Transición por match-dissolve.
panels.action: Transition from Panel 14 match dissolve, same vehicle action.
panels.action_es: Transición desde Panel 14 por match dissolve, misma acción de vehículos.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): Okayyy, big guy. I was just gonna let you know that the entire bridge is under construction!

panels.description: Excavator bucket dumps huge chunks of concrete rubble into Turf Hauler. Rover chases Durango visible through falling rock in FG.
panels.description_es: El balde de la Excavadora descarga enormes trozos de escombro de concreto en el Turf Hauler. El Rover persiguiendo al Durango visible a través de las rocas en primer plano.
panels.action: The bucket of the Excavator opens as huge chunks of concrete rubble rain down into the Turf Hauler. Through the rock in the foreground we see the Rover chasing the Durango.
panels.action_es: El balde de la Excavadora se abre y enormes trozos de escombro de concreto caen al Turf Hauler. A través de las rocas en primer plano vemos al Rover persiguiendo al Durango.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): Might be tough to catch that spy guy with big chunks of the bridge missing.

panels.description: Skidster rolls through panel horizontally, bucket full of rebar, lift arm rising. Rover and Durango race toward it in BG — they're close!
panels.description_es: El Skidster cruza el panel horizontalmente, balde lleno de hierro, brazo de elevación subiendo. Rover y Durango corren hacia él en el fondo — ¡están cerca!
panels.action: The Skidster rolls through the panel horizontally while its bucket lift arm moves up.
panels.action_es: El Skidster rueda a través del panel horizontalmente mientras su brazo de elevación sube.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): No no no no. Stop. / Crosby (V.O.): Can't hear ya! There's too much construction noise!

panels.description: Crosby smiles manipulating Excavator and Turf Hauler. Aimee at diorama level rolling Skidster. Sean's foreshortened hands waving in FG, pleading.
panels.description_es: Crosby sonríe manipulando Excavadora y Turf Hauler. Aimee a nivel de diorama moviendo el Skidster. Las manos escorzadas de Sean gesticulan en primer plano, suplicando.
panels.action: We pull out from Sean's waving foreshortened hands to see the construction play happening on the table. Lower to Crosby and Aimee moving their vehicles taking up full frame.
panels.action_es: Nos alejamos de las manos escorzadas de Sean gesticulando para ver el juego de construcción en la mesa. Bajamos a Crosby y Aimee moviendo sus vehículos llenando el cuadro.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Crosby, the bridge can't be under construction.

panels.description: Crosby holds cardboard tube that used to be DIY bridge. Sean shocked, Crosby innocent. On table: Mountain Escape Getaway, Smalley's Garage Crusher, boxes as city skyline.
panels.description_es: Crosby sostiene un tubo de cartón que era parte del puente DIY. Sean en shock, Crosby inocente. En la mesa: Mountain Escape Getaway, Smalley's Garage Crusher, cajas como skyline de la ciudad.
panels.action: Sean's hand reaches to stop Crosby's hand which is moving away from the bridge with the cardboard tube.
panels.action_es: La mano de Sean intenta detener la mano de Crosby que se aleja del puente con el tubo de cartón.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): Sure it can. Look! / Sean (V.O.): We can't chase Von Steele if the bridge is broken.

panels.description: Crosby smiles holding TWO Excavators, one in each hand, shaking them enticingly. Left hand moves toward Sean.
panels.description_es: Crosby sonríe sosteniendo DOS Excavadoras, una en cada mano, agitándolas tentadoramente. La mano izquierda se mueve hacia Sean.
panels.action: Crosby's hands with the vehicles shake with enticement. The one in his left hand moves towards Sean.
panels.action_es: Las manos de Crosby con los vehículos tiemblan tentadoramente. El de la mano izquierda se mueve hacia Sean.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): We can if we use the right kind of vehicles.

panels.description: Crosby holds Excavator inches from Sean's skeptical face. Excavator moves at Sean; camera pushes in. SFX: real construction sounds build. Match-cut.
panels.description_es: Crosby sostiene la Excavadora a centímetros de la cara escéptica de Sean. La Excavadora avanza hacia Sean; la cámara se acerca. SFX: sonidos reales de construcción crecen. Match-cut.
panels.action: The Excavator moves at Sean. We move in on the Excavator.
panels.action_es: La Excavadora se mueve hacia Sean. Nos acercamos a la Excavadora.

panels.description: Sean driving Excavator filled with concrete rubble. Durango ahead. Sean's face stressed, struggling to steer. CU on confused face, then full-frame Excavator rumbling along bridge.
panels.description_es: Sean conduce una Excavadora llena de escombros de concreto. Durango adelante. Cara de Sean estresada, luchando para dirigir. CU en cara confundida, luego cuadro completo de la Excavadora avanzando por el puente.
panels.action: CU on the surprised and confused face of Sean, body moving with the rumble of the vehicle. Pop to full-frame on the Excavator and pull out as it rumbles along the bridge and see the Dodge Durango getting away.
panels.action_es: CU en la cara sorprendida y confundida de Sean, cuerpo moviéndose con el traqueteo del vehículo. Pop a cuadro completo de la Excavadora y pull out mientras avanza por el puente y vemos al Durango escapándose.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): I'm in a car chase driving a giant Excavator. I can't believe it.

panels.description: Durango steers around Skidster and spool of bridge cabling. Durango slides left; spool slides right and fills frame as Durango disappears into BG.
panels.description_es: El Durango esquiva al Skidster y un carrete de cableado del puente. El Durango se desliza a la izquierda; el carrete se desliza a la derecha y llena el cuadro mientras el Durango desaparece al fondo.
panels.action: The Dodge Durango slides left as the Skidster and spool of bridge cabling slides right. The spool fills the frame as the Durango disappears into the background.
panels.action_es: El Durango se desliza a la izquierda mientras el Skidster y el carrete de cableado del puente se deslizan a la derecha. El carrete llena el cuadro mientras el Durango desaparece en el fondo.
panels.voiceover: Sean (as Von Steele) (V.O.): Thanks. I actually love a good obstacle course. / Sean (V.O.): Von Steele increases his lead as Sean falls behind.

panels.description: Rescue Helicopter (playing as cargo helicopter) carrying pallet of I-beams. Industrial carabiner releases; pallet descends toward bridge.
panels.description_es: El Helicóptero de Rescate (como helicóptero de carga) lleva una paleta de vigas I. El mosquetón industrial se suelta; la paleta desciende hacia el puente.
panels.action: The industrial carabiner holding the pallet releases. The pallet descends toward the bridge.
panels.action_es: El mosquetón industrial que sostiene la paleta se suelta. La paleta desciende hacia el puente.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): Let's see how he likes this obstacle!

panels.description: Pallet of I-beams drops into frame covering full width of bridge, shaking bridge, plume of construction dust in all directions.
panels.description_es: La paleta de vigas I cae al cuadro cubriendo todo el ancho del puente, sacudiéndolo, nube de polvo de construcción en todas direcciones.
panels.action: The pallet drops into frame and lands, shaking the bridge, sending out a plume of construction dust in all directions.
panels.action_es: La paleta cae al cuadro y aterriza, sacudiendo el puente, enviando una nube de polvo de construcción en todas direcciones.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): Nice aim, Charmaine. Von Steele is boxed in.

panels.description: Chaotic foreshortened array of I-beams flying in all directions. F-650 Rollback powers forward behind them, front bumper and grille blasting beams aside. Dust and debris. Match-cut.
panels.description_es: Array caótico de vigas I volando en todas direcciones. El F-650 Rollback avanza detrás de ellas, parachoques y parrilla delantera apartando las vigas. Polvo y escombros. Match-cut.
panels.action: The I-beams shoot out in all directions. The F-650 moves forward behind them. Dust and debris fill the air.
panels.action_es: Las vigas I salen disparadas en todas direcciones. El F-650 avanza detrás de ellas. Polvo y escombros llenan el aire.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Von Steele quickly used his master spy key to steal a heavy duty truck. / Sean (as Von Steele) (V.O.): A little construction is no problem for the great Von Steele!

panels.description: All kids now wear orange hard hats. Sean pushes F-650 through wall of toothpick I-beams. Crosby and Charmaine surprised, Ted snaps in frustration, Aimee shakes head.
panels.description_es: Todos los chicos ahora usan cascos naranjas. Sean empuja el F-650 a través de una pared de palitos-vigas I. Crosby y Charmaine sorprendidos, Ted chasquea frustrado, Aimee niega con la cabeza.
panels.action: We pull out from the F-650 and flying toothpicks. We see Charmaine with her helicopter and Crosby with his Excavator leaning back with hands raising. A little further back, Aimee's head shakes. Ted's arm swings across his body as he snaps.
panels.action_es: Nos alejamos del F-650 y los palitos voladores. Vemos a Charmaine con su helicóptero y Crosby con su Excavadora echándose atrás con las manos levantándose. Más atrás, Aimee niega con la cabeza. Ted chasquea los dedos frustrado.
panels.voiceover: Sean (smashing SFX) (V.O.): Booosh! / Aimee (V.O.): Ugh! This construction is no problem for Von Steele!

panels.description: Crosby's contemplative face, chin on fist. F-650 and two Excavators in front of him. Crosby pushes one Excavator laterally, tracking past other vehicles to empty bridge section.
panels.description_es: Cara contemplativa de Crosby, mentón en puño. F-650 y dos Excavadoras frente a él. Crosby empuja una Excavadora lateralmente, pasando los otros vehículos hacia una sección vacía del puente.
panels.action: Crosby moves laterally pushing the Excavator, tracking past the other vehicles to a part of the bridge that is empty.
panels.action_es: Crosby se mueve lateralmente empujando la Excavadora, pasando los otros vehículos hasta una parte vacía del puente.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): The foreman carefully inspects the construction project.

panels.description: Crosby middle facing forward, Aimee+Ted on one side, Charmaine+Sean on other. Crosby holds Turf Hauler one hand, Excavator other; excited face, arms moving toward each other.
panels.description_es: Crosby en el medio mirando al frente, Aimee+Ted de un lado y Charmaine+Sean del otro. Crosby sostiene Turf Hauler en una mano, Excavadora en la otra; cara emocionada, brazos moviéndose uno hacia el otro.
panels.action: Crosby's face gains excitement as his extended arms holding the two construction vehicles move from the side towards each other.
panels.action_es: La cara de Crosby se llena de emoción mientras sus brazos extendidos con los dos vehículos de construcción se mueven uno hacia el otro.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): I forgot the first step of building. Demolition!

panels.description: Excavator bucket smashes hole through bridge road surface. Bucket drops through frame; huge chunks of concrete fly through air.
panels.description_es: El balde de la Excavadora rompe un agujero en la superficie del puente. El balde cae a través del cuadro; enormes trozos de concreto vuelan por el aire.
panels.action: The bucket of the Excavator drops through frame as huge chunks of the road (concrete) fly through the air.
panels.action_es: El balde de la Excavadora cae a través del cuadro mientras enormes trozos de ruta (concreto) vuelan por el aire.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): Sean! Keep Von Steele busy. If we want to stop him, we've got a mess to make.

panels.description: Sean's Excavator cuts off F-650 at an angle. Excavator turns counterclockwise, bucket arm blocks F-650's path; F-650 stops short to avoid collision.
panels.description_es: La Excavadora de Sean corta el paso al F-650 en ángulo. La Excavadora gira en sentido antihorario, el brazo del balde bloquea el camino del F-650; el F-650 frena bruscamente para evitar la colisión.
panels.action: The Excavator turns counterclockwise in front of the F-650 and its big bucket arm blocks its path. The F-650 turns counterclockwise and stops short to avoid a collision.
panels.action_es: La Excavadora gira en sentido antihorario frente al F-650 y su gran brazo bloquea el camino. El F-650 gira y frena de golpe para evitar la colisión.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Sean uses the bucket of the Excavator to hold off Von Steele. / Sean (as Von Steele) (V.O.): Whoa! Watch it with that thing! Are you crazy? / Sean (V.O.): Yep!

panels.description: Ford F-150 (Ted) and Skidster (Aimee) pull together on chain tearing away section of rebar and concrete road from hole. Moving right to left; chunks fall out of frame creating F-650-sized gap.
panels.description_es: Ford F-150 (Ted) y Skidster (Aimee) tiran juntos de una cadena arrancando una sección de hierro y concreto del agujero. Se mueven de derecha a izquierda; los trozos caen fuera de cuadro creando un hueco del tamaño del F-650.
panels.action: The Ford F-150 and Skidster move right to left in the frame. As they pull on a rod of rebar, chunks of the bridge fall out of frame, creating an F-650-sized gap in the bridge road.
panels.action_es: El Ford F-150 y el Skidster se mueven de derecha a izquierda. Al tirar de una barra de hierro, trozos del puente caen fuera de cuadro, creando un hueco del tamaño del F-650.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (laughing) (V.O.): Yes! Way to wreck Aimee and Ted! (then) Sean, how ya doing?

panels.description: Excavator bucket hooked to F-650 tow hook. Tire smoke billows from F-650's spinning tires; Excavator slowly pulled forward. Pull out from CU of hook.
panels.description_es: El balde de la Excavadora enganchado al gancho de remolque del F-650. Humo sale de los neumáticos del F-650 que giran; la Excavadora es arrastrada lentamente. Pull out desde CU del enganche.
panels.action: We pull out from a CU of the Excavator bucket hooked to the F-650 tail hitch. Tire smoke spreads as the F-650's wheels spin and it slowly pulls the Excavator forward.
panels.action_es: Nos alejamos de un CU del balde de la Excavadora enganchado al gancho del F-650. Humo de neumáticos se extiende mientras las ruedas del F-650 giran y lentamente arrastra la Excavadora.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Sean has the bucket of the Excavator hooked to the Rollback's tow hook, barely holding on. / Sean (as Von Steele) (V.O.): Let go of me!

panels.description: L: Excavator hanging on F-650. R: city skyline. Center: missing chunk of bridge with Skidster+F-150 on left, Excavator on right blocking Von Steele's view. Rescue Helicopter hovers with giant drywall panel sailing in crosswind. INSET: Crosby CU concerned.
panels.description_es: Izq: Excavadora enganchada al F-650. Der: skyline de la ciudad. Centro: hueco del puente con Skidster+F-150 a la izq, Excavadora a la der bloqueando la vista de Von Steele. Helicóptero de Rescate suspendido con panel gigante de drywall navegando en viento cruzado. INSET: CU de Crosby preocupado.
panels.action: Starting wide, we zoom in on the Rescue Helicopter being blown right, left, forward and back by huge gusts of cross-wind blasting the drywall panel like a sail. INSET stays in position.
panels.action_es: Arrancando wide, hacemos zoom in sobre el Helicóptero de Rescate siendo empujado en todas direcciones por fuertes ráfagas de viento cruzado que mueven el panel de drywall como una vela. El INSET se mantiene en posición.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): Charmaine, we need to lay that flimsy drywall over the hole. When Von Steele drives over it, he'll fall right through it! / Charmaine (V.O.): WhoooA! WhoooA! I'm caught in a cross-wind. This might not work!

panels.description: Charmaine holds Rescue Helicopter above paper with hastily drawn road markings. Ted's cheeks puffed blowing on paper, face red. Sean and Aimee doubled over laughing in BG.
panels.description_es: Charmaine sostiene el Helicóptero de Rescate sobre un papel con marcas de camino improvisadas. Ted con las mejillas infladas soplando el papel, cara roja. Sean y Aimee desternillándose de risa en el fondo.
panels.action: Charmaine's arms, the helicopter and the paper swing back and forth. Ted's head and shoulders match that rhythm coming in and out of frame. His cheeks puff out and relax as his face gets redder. Sean and Aimee rock forward and back.
panels.action_es: Los brazos de Charmaine, el helicóptero y el papel se balancean de un lado a otro. La cabeza y hombros de Ted siguen ese ritmo entrando y saliendo de cuadro. Sus mejillas se inflan y relajan mientras su cara se pone más roja. Sean y Aimee se mecen adelante y atrás.
panels.voiceover: Ted (V.O.): (wind noises) / Sean/Aimee (V.O.): (laughter) / Charmaine (V.O.): Whoooa! Whoooa!

panels.description: Crosby and Charmaine lean in close to play area, each holding one side of paper above bridge gap. Arms lower evenly; paper lays on bridge, bows slightly in middle.
panels.description_es: Crosby y Charmaine se inclinan cerca del área de juego, cada uno sosteniendo un lado del papel sobre el hueco del puente. Los brazos bajan uniformemente; el papel queda sobre el puente, curvándose ligeramente en el medio.
panels.action: Crosby and Charmaine's arms lower evenly until the paper lays on the bridge. The paper bows in the middle a bit.
panels.action_es: Los brazos de Crosby y Charmaine bajan uniformemente hasta que el papel queda sobre el puente. El papel se curva un poco en el medio.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): Lower it in very carefully. It looks just like a road, but that drywall is paper thin.

panels.description: F-650 dominates right FG. Excavator bucket just lifted from tow hook. Sean in cab, hard hat and seatbelt, eyes wide. Excavator arm pops up; F-650 zooms off right, tire smoke plumes.
panels.description_es: El F-650 domina el primer plano derecho. El balde de la Excavadora recién soltado del gancho de remolque. Sean en la cabina con casco y cinturón, ojos abiertos. El brazo de la Excavadora sube; el F-650 sale disparado, columnas de humo de neumáticos.
panels.action: The Excavator arm pops up a bit and the F-650 zooms out the right side of the frame. Tire smoke plumes.
panels.action_es: El brazo de la Excavadora sube un poco y el F-650 sale disparado por la derecha del cuadro. Columnas de humo de neumáticos.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Von Steele's truck pops free. Now Sean just has to make sure he's going fast enough that he can't stop before the hole.

panels.description: F-650 speeds forward with Excavator right behind. Both going max speed. Bridge moves R-L in BG. Trucks trade lead back and forth. Background blurs as speed increases.
panels.description_es: El F-650 avanza a toda velocidad con la Excavadora justo detrás. Ambos a máxima velocidad. El puente se mueve de der a izq en el fondo. Los camiones intercambian la punta una y otra vez. El fondo se difumina con la velocidad.
panels.action: The bridge moves right to left in the background. The F-650 and the Excavator trade the lead back and forth several times. The background blurs a little as they speed up.
panels.action_es: El puente se mueve de derecha a izquierda en el fondo. El F-650 y la Excavadora intercambian la delantera varias veces. El fondo se difumina al acelerar.
panels.voiceover: Sean (as Von Steele) (V.O.): How are you going so fast in that thing? / Sean (V.O.): Are you running out of gas Von Steele? / Sean (as Von Steele) (V.O.): Never! You want to see fast? I'll show you fast!

panels.description: Straight-ahead down bridge. F-650 just ahead of Sean's Excavator. Skidster and F-150 perpendicular to road in front of drywall fake road. Crosby's Excavator past drywall. Top-left: Rescue Helicopter. F-150/Skidster move to left lane clearing path.
panels.description_es: Vista frontal a lo largo del puente. F-650 justo delante de la Excavadora de Sean. Skidster y F-150 perpendiculares al camino frente al falso camino de drywall. Excavadora de Crosby más allá del drywall. Arriba izq: Helicóptero de Rescate. El F-150/Skidster se mueven al carril izq despejando el paso.
panels.action: In the right lane, the F-650 and Sean's Excavator move toward the drywall section. The Skidster and F-150 move to be in the left lane facing away from the drywall section (clearing a path for the F-650). The blades of the Rescue Helicopter spin.
panels.action_es: En el carril derecho, el F-650 y la Excavadora de Sean avanzan hacia la sección de drywall. El Skidster y F-150 se mueven al carril izquierdo mirando en dirección opuesta al drywall (despejando el camino para el F-650). Las aspas del Helicóptero de Rescate giran.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): We did it! Aimee and Ted, clear out. And Sean... BRAKE!

panels.description: F-650 directly on drywall fake road. Smoke billows from Excavator treads. INSET: ECU Von Steele's eyes wide, mouth open, perspiration+spittle flying. F-650 skids onto drywall; Excavator screeches to stop inches from gap. Drywall snaps in two. F-650 drops.
panels.description_es: El F-650 directamente sobre el falso camino de drywall. Humo sale de las orugas de la Excavadora de Sean. INSET: ECU cara de Von Steele con ojos desorbitados, boca abierta, sudor y saliva volando. El F-650 derrapa sobre el drywall; la Excavadora frena a centímetros del hueco. El drywall se parte en dos. El F-650 cae.
panels.action: The F-650 skids onto the drywall section. Sean's Excavator screeches to a stop inches from the section. Tire smoke fills the air. Beat. The drywall section snaps in two in the middle. The F-650 drops down out of frame. INSET: Von Steele's face shakes and moves to fill where the F-650 was.
panels.action_es: El F-650 derrapa sobre la sección de drywall. La Excavadora de Sean frena chirriando a centímetros de la sección. Humo de neumáticos llena el aire. Pausa. El drywall se parte en dos por el medio. El F-650 cae fuera de cuadro. INSET: La cara de Von Steele tiembla y llena donde estaba el F-650.
panels.voiceover: Sean (as Von Steele) (V.O.): Whooa! (safe) Ha-ha! I'm safe. (falling) Ahhh!

panels.description: Above missing bridge section. Crosby's Excavator arm fully extended from FG down through opening. Excavator bucket catches/hooks F-650's tow hook as F-650 falls tire-first, jerks to stop.
panels.description_es: Sobre la sección faltante del puente. El brazo de la Excavadora de Crosby completamente extendido desde el primer plano hacia abajo a través de la abertura. El balde atrapa/engancha el gancho de remolque del F-650 mientras cae con neumáticos primero, frenándolo en seco.
panels.action: The Excavator arm tracks with the F-650 which is falling straight down, tire first. The bucket of the Excavator catches the F-650's tow hook and it jerks to a stop.
panels.action_es: El brazo de la Excavadora sigue al F-650 que cae en picada, neumáticos primero. El balde de la Excavadora atrapa el gancho de remolque del F-650 y se detiene de golpe.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): Got'em!

panels.description: Sean leans against Rover 6x6. In left hand, handcuffs dangle from two fingers like pendulum. BG: F-650 Rollback dangles from Excavator bucket like Christmas ornament. Rack focus Sean to Excavator arm raising F-650.
panels.description_es: Sean apoyado contra el Rover 6x6. En la mano izquierda, esposas colgando de dos dedos como un péndulo. Fondo: el F-650 Rollback cuelga del balde de la Excavadora como un adorno de Navidad. Cambio de foco de Sean al brazo de la Excavadora levantando el F-650.
panels.action: CU of handcuffs slowly swinging like a pendulum on Sean's fingers. As we pull out we rack focus from Sean to the arm of Crosby's Excavator raising the F-650 above bridge level.
panels.action_es: CU de esposas balanceándose lentamente como un péndulo en los dedos de Sean. Al alejarnos, cambio de foco de Sean al brazo de la Excavadora de Crosby levantando el F-650 sobre el nivel del puente.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Crosby, you were right. Your construction vehicles worked great for catching Von Steele.

panels.description: 45° diagonal divides image: empty cab of dangling F-650. INSET: Sean next to Rover 6x6, shocked face, hands up, handcuffs mid-fall. F-650 rocks side to side; handcuffs drop out of frame.
panels.description_es: Una diagonal a 45° divide la imagen: cabina vacía del F-650 colgante. INSET: Sean junto al Rover 6x6, cara de shock, manos arriba, esposas cayendo. El F-650 se balancea de lado a lado; las esposas caen fuera de cuadro.
panels.action: The F-650 rocks side to side as it dangles. Sean's handcuffs drop out of frame as we push in on his shocked face.
panels.action_es: El F-650 se balancea de lado a lado mientras cuelga. Las esposas de Sean caen fuera de cuadro mientras hacemos push in sobre su cara de shock.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): As the truck comes up into view, Sean sees that the cab is empty! / Sean (V.O.): He's gone! That criminal super-spy has escaped justice again!

panels.description: Sean holds out Rover 6x6 in FG, steely determination. Crosby+Ted left, Aimee+Charmaine right — hands of comfort on his shoulders. Pull back, rack-focus to Rover 6x6.
panels.description_es: Sean sostiene el Rover 6x6 en primer plano, con determinación de acero. Crosby+Ted a la izq, Aimee+Charmaine a la der — manos de apoyo sobre sus hombros. Pull back, cambio de foco al Rover 6x6.
panels.action: The hands of his friends land on Sean's shoulders and we pull back and rack-focus to the Rover 6x6.
panels.action_es: Las manos de sus amigos se posan sobre los hombros de Sean y nos alejamos con cambio de foco hacia el Rover 6x6.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): I'll get you— No. We'll get you next time Von Steele!

panels.description: Kids stand side-by-side behind play area, smiling, R-to-L: Charmaine, Aimee, Sean, Ted, Crosby. Each holds signature vehicle with outside hand — Charmaine/Rescue Heli, Aimee/Mustang, Sean/Rover, Ted/Triumph, Crosby/Excavator. Arms rise in rapid succession; camera pulls out.
panels.description_es: Los chicos de pie lado a lado detrás del área de juego, sonriendo, de der a izq: Charmaine, Aimee, Sean, Ted, Crosby. Cada uno sostiene su vehículo insignia con la mano exterior — Charmaine/Helicóptero, Aimee/Mustang, Sean/Rover, Ted/Triumph, Crosby/Excavadora. Los brazos se levantan en rápida sucesión; la cámara se aleja.
panels.action: In rapid succession the arms holding the vehicles rise into position. As the last one hits its mark we slowly pull out.
panels.action_es: En rápida sucesión los brazos con los vehículos se levantan a su posición. Cuando el último llega a su marca nos alejamos lentamente.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Nothing can stop the... / All (V.O.): MATCHBOX CREW!

panels.description: Aimee in a muddy Toyota Tacoma splashing through a mud puddle on a wet dirt road in dense jungle. A wooden crate strapped in the back bed has a big red "X" on it.
panels.description_es: Aimee en una Toyota Tacoma embarrada salpicando un charco de barro en un camino de tierra mojado en medio de una jungla densa. Hay una caja de madera atada en la batea con una gran "X" roja.
panels.action: A>B - The Toyota Tacoma flies in from the left, the crate strapped but floating a bit above the back bed. The vehicle lands mid-frame, mud splashes up and the crate lands hard in the back. The vehicle and crate continue toward the right.
panels.action_es: A>B - La Toyota Tacoma entra volando desde la izquierda, el cofre atado pero flotando un poco sobre la caja. El vehículo aterriza en el centro del cuadro, el barro salpica y el cofre cae con fuerza atrás. El vehículo y el cofre siguen hacia la derecha.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): (narration) Aimee races through the jungle after finding the missing top secret special crate!

panels.description: 3/4 front, side view of the Tacoma flying toward camera (not at camera). Aimee, seat-belted, hands on wheel, face part excited part scared. Background: dense jungle and 1/3 of a dilapidated wooden bridge missing center section. Foreground: the other 1/3 of the bridge with vines and overgrowth.
panels.description_es: Vista 3/4 frontal y lateral de la Tacoma volando hacia cámara (no directo). Aimee con cinturón y manos en el volante, cara entre emocionada y asustada. Al fondo, jungla densa y 1/3 de un puente de madera derruido al que le falta la sección central. En primer plano, el otro 1/3 del puente con enredaderas y vegetación.
panels.action: A>B - As the Tacoma jumps over the missing section, Aimee's eyes widen. The bridge portion in the background rises and the bridge portion in the foreground lowers as it's revealed into frame. Tires are spinning. A few wooden shards of the bridge fall out of frame.
panels.action_es: A>B - Mientras la Tacoma salta sobre la sección faltante, los ojos de Aimee se abren de par en par. La parte del puente al fondo sube y la del primer plano baja mientras se revela en cuadro. Los neumáticos giran. Caen astillas de madera del puente al fondo.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): We need to get this box of goodies back to headquarters before it's too late!

panels.description: Title card. Matchbox Crew logo with episode title.
panels.description_es: Placa de título. Logo Matchbox Crew con el título del episodio.
panels.action: The title zips into position as Aimee says the title.
panels.action_es: El título se desliza a su posición mientras Aimee lo dice.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): The Matchbox Crew Jungle Race!

panels.description: Mechanic's garage with Matchbox play space on a large table. Expansive DIY jungle set with green construction paper trees, twine vines and real dirt roads. Aimee pushes mini Toyota Tacoma through the jungle. Sean, Crosby and Charmaine strain to see.
panels.description_es: Taller de mecánico con espacio de juego Matchbox sobre una mesa grande en el centro. Set de jungla DIY con árboles de papel verde, lianas de cordel y caminos de tierra real. Aimee empuja la versión miniatura de la Toyota Tacoma por la jungla. Sean, Crosby y Charmaine se esfuerzan por ver.
panels.action: MOTION MOMENT - We pull out from Aimee's hand pushing the Tacoma across the screen. As we move back the rest of the scene dissolves into view. Sean, Crosby and Charmaine lean toward the action.
panels.action_es: Nos alejamos de la mano de Aimee empujando la Tacoma. La escena se va revelando. Sean, Crosby y Charmaine se inclinan hacia la acción.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): (vroom!) / Aimee (V.O.): They need this crate by noon. I'll have to go faster than ever to make it in time! / Charmaine (gets it) (V.O.): Sounds like you might need help from a friend... with a plane!

panels.description: In each image Aimee hands one of her friends a vehicle. Charmaine the Super Hercules airplane and Sean and Crosby each a Polaris RZR with a paperclip taped to the side.
panels.description_es: En cada imagen Aimee le entrega un vehículo a un compañero. A Charmaine el avión Super Hercules, y a Sean y Crosby cada uno un Polaris RZR con un clip pegado al costado.
panels.action: Three singles stack vertically forming a split-screen of the team. Aimee with Charmaine, Aimee with Crosby, Aimee with Sean. As each image drops in, Aimee with the vehicle meets the other character, hand out palm-up.
panels.action_es: Tres planos se apilan verticalmente formando un split-screen. Aimee con Charmaine, Aimee con Crosby, Aimee con Sean. En cada imagen, Aimee le entrega un vehículo al compañero que tiene la mano abierta.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): Charmaine in the plane, I'll meet you at the airstrip. Crosby and Sean, you clear the way!

panels.description: Sean's hand holds his Polaris RZR with a paperclip taped to the side in his flat hand. His face is scrunched. Aimee is next to him with a proud, enthusiastic face.
panels.description_es: La mano de Sean sostiene su Polaris RZR con un clip pegado al costado en la palma extendida frente a él. Cara arrugada. Aimee al lado con cara orgullosa y entusiasta.
panels.action: MOTION MOMENT - The hand with the car rises into frame as Sean leans in and his face scrunches. Aimee's eyebrows raise as she slides in quick from the left on her line.
panels.action_es: La mano con el auto sube al cuadro mientras Sean se inclina y arruga la cara. Aimee levanta las cejas y entra rápido por la izquierda al hablar.
panels.voiceover: Sean (bewildered) (V.O.): What's this supposed to be? / Aimee (excited) (V.O.): It's a robot arm buzzsaw I added... so that the two of you can clear a path for me. (then) Please.

panels.description: Aimee hunched over pushing the Tacoma through the jungle play area in foreground. Charmaine flies the Super Hercules right above her.
panels.description_es: Aimee inclinada empujando la Tacoma por el área de juego de la jungla en primer plano. Charmaine vuela el Super Hercules justo por encima de ella.
panels.action: A>B - Aimee and her vehicle move forward and left to right in the frame. Charmaine's arm with the Super Hercules drops into frame and tracks with Aimee.
panels.action_es: Aimee y su vehículo se mueven hacia adelante y de izquierda a derecha. El brazo de Charmaine con el Super Hercules entra al cuadro y acompaña a Aimee.
panels.voiceover: Aimee/Charmaine (truck and plane noises) (V.O.): <vroom> <hrrrgh>

panels.description: Aimee in the Tacoma with speed indicators. The Super Hercules flies directly above in the blue sky.
panels.description_es: Aimee en la Tacoma con indicadores de velocidad. El Super Hercules vuela justo encima en el cielo azul.
panels.action: A>B - The plane tracks with the Tacoma as it moves quickly across the frame. Pieces of foliage whip by in the foreground to show how fast she is going.
panels.action_es: El avión acompaña a la Tacoma mientras cruza rápido el cuadro. Fragmentos de vegetación pasan volando en primer plano para mostrar la velocidad.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): Aimee, the airfield is really far. You'll have to make it there in record time.

panels.description: Aimee in the Tacoma with two hands gripping the wheel. A blur of jungle behind her and some jungle covering the lower part of the truck.
panels.description_es: Aimee en la Tacoma con dos manos agarrando el volante. Borrón de jungla atrás y algo de jungla cubriendo la parte baja de la camioneta.
panels.action: MOTION MOMENT - The Tacoma bounces and shakes. The jungle whips by behind her, right to left. Several branches and tall grasses whip by in the foreground. Slow push in on her focused face as the angled Tacoma fills the foreground.
panels.action_es: La Tacoma rebota y se sacude. La jungla pasa volando atrás, de derecha a izquierda. Ramas y pastos altos pasan volando en primer plano. Push in lento sobre su cara concentrada.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): (narration) Aimee hits the gas pedal. (as Aimee) Breaking speed records is my specialty.

panels.description: Split screen of Sean and Crosby seat-belted in their Polaris RZRs. Both have steering wheels pulled to the left. Cut foliage mid-air in foreground. INSET: EWS near-birds-eye. Tacoma positioned on a super zig-zaggy road through the jungle. The two RZRs in front of her at the end of the path.
panels.description_es: Split screen de Sean y Crosby con cinturón en sus Polaris RZR. Ambos tienen el volante girado a la izquierda. Hay vegetación cortada en el aire en primer plano. INSET: Vista cenital. La Tacoma posicionada en un camino súper zigzagueante por la jungla. Los dos RZR adelante de ella al final del camino.
panels.action: A>B - Sean and Crosby quickly wrench their steering wheels from side to side in synchronization. The foliage flies as the buzzsaw RZRs finish creating the zig-zag road. INSET: Lower center. Tacoma moves super fast and smooth through the full zig-zag jungle road.
panels.action_es: Sean y Crosby giran el volante rápido de un lado a otro de forma sincronizada. La vegetación vuela mientras los RZR con sierra terminan de crear el camino en zigzag. INSET: La Tacoma cruza muy rápido y limpia el camino completo en zigzag.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): Great job, guys! I'm gonna make it!

panels.description: The hood of the Tacoma fills the lower frame foreground. In the truck cab, Aimee is shocked and stressed — eyes wide, mouth open, sweat flying.
panels.description_es: El capot de la Tacoma llena la parte baja del primer plano. En la cabina, Aimee impactada y estresada — ojos muy abiertos, boca abierta, sudor volando.
panels.action: MOTION MOMENT - From a far-center dot the Tacoma races toward screen. The truck is shaking with speed, then jerks to a stop full frame.
panels.action_es: Desde un punto lejano en el centro, la Tacoma viene corriendo hacia cámara. La camioneta se sacude por la velocidad y después frena de golpe llenando el cuadro.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): Whoa!

panels.description: "Over the shoulder" of the Tacoma a black Dodge Durango flanked by two Polaris RZRs each with a robot arm with a buzzsaw attached to one side (all in black helmets and black clothing) block the road.
panels.description_es: "Sobre el hombro" de la Tacoma, un Dodge Durango negro flanqueado por dos Polaris RZR cada uno con un brazo robot con sierra pegado a un costado (todos con cascos negros y ropa negra) bloquean el camino.
panels.action: MOTION MOMENT - The Dodge Durango and Polaris RZRs move in and stop, dust plumes around them. The Tacoma jerks to a stop, dust billows up in the foreground.
panels.action_es: El Dodge Durango y los Polaris RZR entran y se detienen, con nubes de polvo a su alrededor. La Tacoma frena de golpe y el polvo sube en primer plano.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): (narration) Suddenly criminal super-spy Von Steele blocks the road! / Crosby (V.O.): (gasp) Oh, no! Not him! Not Von Steele. / Sean (as Von Steele) (V.O.): Yes! It is me. Hand over that top secret special crate.

panels.description: 3/4 view on Aimee standing up with arms crossed and head cocked to one side. Her face, not amused. In foreground, 1/4-off over the shoulder of Sean (wearing his Von Steele eyepatch) and Crosby hunched over the table with hands on the Durango and Polaris RZRs.
panels.description_es: Vista 3/4 de Aimee parada con los brazos cruzados y la cabeza inclinada a un lado. Cara nada divertida. En primer plano, sobre los hombros de Sean (con el parche de Von Steele) y Crosby inclinados sobre la mesa con las manos en el Durango y los Polaris RZR.
panels.action: MOTION MOMENT - Aimee's image grows in size as her head cocks to one side. The boys' images shrink, their shoulders bouncing with laughter.
panels.action_es: La imagen de Aimee crece mientras inclina la cabeza. Las imágenes de los chicos se achican, los hombros saltando de la risa.
panels.voiceover: Sean/Crosby (V.O.): (laughter) / Aimee (V.O.): Sean. This is supposed to be a race to the plane.

panels.description: Aimee and Sean side by side. Sean has one hand on his eyepatch now pulled up, revealing his eye. He holds the Durango in foreground. Crosby holding the two Polaris RZRs is leaning in from Sean's side.
panels.description_es: Aimee y Sean lado a lado. Sean tiene una mano en su parche que ahora está levantado, revelando el ojo. Sostiene el Durango en primer plano. Crosby con los dos Polaris RZR está apoyándose desde el lado de Sean.
panels.action: A>B - Sean's face brightens as he lifts his eyepatch and raises the Durango with the other hand. On his line, Crosby pops in and the RZRs rise in frame.
panels.action_es: La cara de Sean se ilumina al levantarse el parche y elevar el Durango con la otra mano. Al hablar, Crosby entra y los RZR suben al cuadro.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): It still is! But Von Steele is going to race you there and try to take the top secret special crate. / Crosby (V.O.): With his bad guy lumberjacks! I'm gonna use the buzzsaw arm for buzzing down trees.

panels.description: Aimee has a confident smile. In front of her she holds the Toyota Tacoma in one hand and the Chevy Stock Car in the other. Off her two shoulders, Crosby and Sean with surprised faces. Zoom in on the Stock Car.
panels.description_es: Aimee con sonrisa confiada. Frente a ella sostiene la Toyota Tacoma en una mano y el Chevy Stock Car en la otra. A los lados, Crosby y Sean con caras sorprendidas. Zoom in sobre el Stock Car.
panels.action: A>B - Aimee's hand with the Tacoma lowers out of frame as the hand with the Chevy Stock Car rises into frame. Sean and Crosby reveal, eyes widen during the car swap.
panels.action_es: La mano de Aimee con la Tacoma baja saliendo del cuadro mientras la mano con el Chevy Stock Car sube al cuadro. Las imágenes de Sean y Crosby se revelan y los ojos se abren durante el cambio.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): You can try. Good luck catching me in this.

panels.description: Against backdrop of jungle, dust flies around Aimee in the Chevy Stock Car with the wooden crate strapped on top of the back, the Super Hercules flying directly above super low. The Durango right behind the Stock Car.
panels.description_es: Contra un fondo de jungla, polvo alrededor de Aimee en el Chevy Stock Car con el cofre de madera atado encima de la parte trasera, el Super Hercules volando justo arriba muy bajo. El Durango justo atrás del Chevy Stock Car.
panels.action: A>B - The jungle moves as a blur in the background. The side view of the Tacoma with the crate (Panel 8) cross-dissolves to the Stock Car with the crate. As we widen, the airplane zooms ahead and lowers from the sky to land.
panels.action_es: La jungla pasa como un borrón al fondo. La vista lateral de la Tacoma con el cofre (Panel 8) hace cross-dissolve al Stock Car con el cofre. El avión se adelanta volando y baja del cielo para aterrizar.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): I'm almost to the airfield. / Charmaine (V.O.): Roger that. Coming in for my landing now.

panels.description: The airfield is a strip of clearing surrounded by jungle. There is an abandoned airport office at the far end with overgrown vines (highly resembles Smalley's Garage Crusher playset). Four huge tree trunks stretch across the landing strip making landing impossible. The Super Hercules flies low above. The two Polaris RZRs with buzzsaws are in the background past the fallen trees. [TREE NOTE: only cutting down old and dead trees]
panels.description_es: La pista de aterrizaje es un claro rodeado de jungla. Hay una oficina de aeropuerto abandonada al final con enredaderas (que se parece mucho al playset Smalley's Garage Crusher). Cuatro troncos enormes atraviesan la pista en intervalos haciendo imposible aterrizar. El Super Hercules vuela bajo. Los dos Polaris RZR con sierras al fondo más allá de los árboles caídos. [NOTA TREE: solo corta árboles viejos y muertos]
panels.action: A>B - The frame shakes from the THOOMP of four fallen trees. As dust clears it reveals the blocked runway. The plane is small from background. The plane dips like it's going to land then rises up to avoid landing on the fallen trees.
panels.action_es: El cuadro tiembla por el THOOMP de cuatro árboles caídos. Cuando se asienta el polvo se ve la pista bloqueada. El avión chico al fondo. Hace amague de aterrizar y después sube para evitar los árboles.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): (narration) Little does she know, my buzzsaw car has blocked the runway with trees! / Aimee (V.O.): Watch out, Charmaine! Abort! Abort! / Charmaine (V.O.): (struggling) whooOOOA! That was so close. Now what do we do?

panels.description: The back of the Stock Car just breaking the tree line of the jungle. The Dodge Durango close behind.
panels.description_es: La parte trasera del Stock Car justo entrando a la línea de árboles de la jungla. El Dodge Durango muy cerca atrás.
panels.action: A>B - Trees bow and spread as the Stock Car zooms into the jungle and disappears, followed by the Durango. Jungle leaves fly.
panels.action_es: Los árboles se inclinan y se abren mientras el Stock Car entra a la jungla y desaparece, seguido por el Durango. Vuelan hojas.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): I'll lose 'em in the jungle. You find a new place to land.

panels.description: On a narrow jungle road, front view of the Stock Car and Dodge Durango side by side. Aimee and Von Steele are intense.
panels.description_es: En un camino angosto de jungla, vista frontal del Stock Car y el Dodge Durango lado a lado. Aimee y Von Steele intensos.
panels.action: MOTION MOMENT - As the Stock Car and Durango move through frame they side-bump each other. Sparks fly and the cars split off into separate sides of the screen.
panels.action_es: Mientras el Stock Car y el Durango cruzan el cuadro chocan de costado. Saltan chispas y los autos se separan a los lados de la pantalla.
panels.voiceover: Sean (as Von Steele) (V.O.): Seems like you're not as fast as you thought you were! / Aimee (V.O.): If I didn't have this heavy crate you'd be eating my dust. / Sean (as Von Steele) (V.O.): I guess you're better at making excuses than you are at driving.

panels.description: Green jungle leaves splattered throughout the screen. The Stock Car flies through dense foliage. A parrot flies top of screen.
panels.description_es: Hojas verdes salpicadas por toda la pantalla. El Stock Car cruza vegetación densa. Un loro vuela arriba.
panels.action: A>B - Leaves sway in the super-serene jungle, a parrot flaps through the frame. Beat. Leaves explode and spread out everywhere as the Stock Car shoots through the dense foliage.
panels.action_es: Hojas se mecen en la jungla muy serena, un loro aletea por el cuadro. Beat. Las hojas explotan y se esparcen en todas direcciones mientras el Stock Car atraviesa la vegetación densa.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): Whoo-hoo!

panels.description: Three horizontal sections, side view. Top section: RZR with buzzsaw facing left with a sawed-through tree behind. Middle: Excavator bucket hitting a tree trunk. Bottom: RZR with buzzsaw facing right with a sawed-through tree behind.
panels.description_es: Tres secciones horizontales, vista lateral. Sección superior: un RZR con sierra mirando a la izquierda con un árbol serruchado atrás. Sección media: el brazo del Excavator golpea un tronco. Sección inferior: un RZR con sierra mirando a la derecha con un árbol serruchado atrás.
panels.action: A>B - Buzz - an RZR goes right to left in the top panel, behind the tree, buzzes through it. Same in the bottom section left to right. Finally the Excavator bucket arm swings in and THUMPS into the tree trunk in the middle section.
panels.action_es: Buzz - un RZR cruza de derecha a izquierda en el panel superior, pasa atrás del árbol y lo serrucha. Lo mismo en el inferior de izquierda a derecha. Finalmente el brazo del Excavator entra y THUMPS contra el tronco en el panel del medio.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): (narration) the bad guy lumberjacks buzz down old trees to block the jungle paths!

panels.description: Three vertical sections, front view. Right and left sections: Stock Car facing camera with tree trunk blocking. Center: back of Stock Car facing camera with tree blocking.
panels.description_es: Tres secciones verticales, vista frontal. Las secciones derecha e izquierda: Stock Car de frente con un tronco bloqueándole el camino. Sección central: parte trasera del Stock Car con un árbol bloqueándole.
panels.action: A>B - In the right section the Stock Car comes forward — THOOMP! a tree thumps down stopping its path. Same in middle as Stock Car backs up. Same in left as it drives forward.
panels.action_es: En la sección derecha el Stock Car avanza — THOOMP! un árbol cae trabándole el paso. Lo mismo en el medio mientras retrocede. Lo mismo en la izquierda mientras avanza.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): Yikes! Eek! Whoa!

panels.description: A clearing. Aimee's Stock Car with the crate is boxed in by three fallen trees and the Durango.
panels.description_es: Un claro. El Stock Car de Aimee con el cofre, encajonado por tres árboles caídos y el Durango.
panels.action: MOTION MOMENT - Zoom out from the Stock Car spitting dust as it grinds a donut, looking for an escape. The Durango moves into the only possible escape path.
panels.action_es: Zoom out desde el Stock Car salpicando polvo mientras hace un donut buscando salida. El Durango se mete en el único camino de escape posible.
panels.voiceover: Sean (as Von Steele) (V.O.): I'll take that top secret special crate thank you.

panels.description: Aimee smirks as she leans in center with her hands on her hips. To her left Sean in his eyepatch holds the Durango, to her right Crosby is holding the two RZRs.
panels.description_es: Aimee con sonrisa pícara apoyada en el centro con las manos en la cintura. A su izquierda, Sean con su parche sostiene el Durango. A su derecha, Crosby sostiene los dos RZR.
panels.action: MOTION MOMENT - As Aimee's eyes move side to side, Sean and Crosby move back.
panels.action_es: Mientras los ojos de Aimee se mueven de un lado a otro, Sean y Crosby retroceden.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): You have the Durango, two tree-cutting cars AND an Excavator. It almost doesn't seem fair.

panels.description: Sean smiles, one arm around Crosby and the other in a playful shrug. Aimee left of frame in 3/4.
panels.description_es: Sean sonríe con un brazo alrededor de Crosby y el otro encogido en gesto juguetón. Aimee a la izquierda en 3/4.
panels.action: MOTION MOMENT - Sean's shoulders and arm go up.
panels.action_es: Los hombros y el brazo de Sean suben.
panels.voiceover: Sean (teasing) (V.O.): What can I say? We're really good at being bad.

panels.description: Ted stands on the right, big smile, arms open wide, holding his Triumph Scrambler forward. The other four kids are on the left, big smiles, cheering, fist pumps.
panels.description_es: Ted parado a la derecha, gran sonrisa, brazos abiertos, sosteniendo su Triumph Scrambler hacia adelante. Los otros cuatro chicos a la izquierda con grandes sonrisas, festejando, levantando puños.
panels.action: A>B - Ted drops into frame with a bounce. The other kids pop up into frame, each with their own wiggle of celebration. At the end we push in on the Triumph Scrambler.
panels.action_es: Ted cae al cuadro con un rebote. Los otros chicos saltan al cuadro, cada uno con su gesto de celebración. Al final hacemos push in sobre el Triumph Scrambler.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): I meant it doesn't seem fair for you. Because, I also have TED! / Ted (V.O.): Hang on to your helmets, Ted is here! / All (V.O.): (cheering)

panels.description: The clearing where Aimee's Stock Car is boxed in by fallen trees and the Durango. Ted on his Triumph Scrambler (in a helmet) is flying into the clearing mid-air.
panels.description_es: El claro donde el Stock Car de Aimee está encajonado por árboles caídos y el Durango. Ted en su Triumph Scrambler (con casco) entra volando al claro en pleno aire.
panels.action: A>B - The Triumph Scrambler lands between the Durango and the Stock Car and shoots forward, blasting a leafy car-sized hole in the thick jungle foliage.
panels.action_es: El Triumph Scrambler aterriza entre el Durango y el Stock Car y dispara hacia adelante, abriendo un hueco del tamaño de un auto en la vegetación densa.
panels.voiceover: Ted (V.O.): If there's no way out, I'll make a way out. Follow me!

panels.description: Aimee's Stock Car and Ted's Triumph are driving side by side on a jungle path.
panels.description_es: El Stock Car de Aimee y el Triumph de Ted manejan lado a lado por un camino de jungla.
panels.action: MOTION MOMENT - Leaves flutter to sides as the Triumph and Stock Car shake while driving on the rough jungle road.
panels.action_es: Las hojas vuelan a los costados mientras el Triumph y el Stock Car se sacuden por el camino accidentado.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): If you take care of those lumberjacks, I know I can out race Von Steele to that plane! / Ted (V.O.): You've got it!

panels.description: Stock Car and Triumph driving side by side on a jungle path. The Durango and RZRs coming up behind. The Super Hercules above them in foreground.
panels.description_es: Vista cenital. Stock Car y Triumph manejan lado a lado por un camino de jungla. Durango y RZR vienen atrás. Super Hercules arriba en primer plano.
panels.action: A>B - The Stock Car and Triumph move along the road. The Triumph peels off to the left followed by the RZRs, the Stock Car to the right followed by the Durango. As the Super Hercules passes into frame from the right.
panels.action_es: El Stock Car y el Triumph avanzan por el camino. El Triumph se desprende a la izquierda seguido por los RZR, el Stock Car a la derecha seguido por el Durango. Mientras el Super Hercules pasa al cuadro desde la derecha.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): I found a new place to land on the other side of the jungle! (then) Aimee, watch out behind you!

panels.description: Car-level view of a jungle road four-way intersection. The taillights of the Stock Car in background on the vertical road, the Dodge Durango on the right on the road that runs horizontally.
panels.description_es: Vista a nivel del auto de un cruce de cuatro caminos en la jungla. Las luces traseras del Stock Car al fondo en el camino vertical, el Dodge Durango a la derecha en el camino horizontal.
panels.action: A>B - The Durango zips through frame left to right. The Stock Car zips through frame top to bottom. The Durango zips through frame right to left.
panels.action_es: El Durango cruza el cuadro de izquierda a derecha. El Stock Car cruza de arriba abajo. El Durango cruza de derecha a izquierda.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): (narration) Aimee twists and turns through the jungle to lose Von Steele. / Sean (as Von Steele) (V.O.): Where is she? (beat) What was that! / Aimee (V.O.): (playful taunts) Ha-ha. Nope! Ha-ha!

panels.description: A large bunch of bananas hangs from a banana tree center frame. Ted on the Triumph Scrambler is coming up on the tree and has his tree-side hand up.
panels.description_es: Un racimo grande de bananas cuelga de un árbol en el centro del cuadro. Ted en el Triumph Scrambler se acerca al árbol con la mano del lado del árbol levantada.
panels.action: A>B - Ted on the Triumph Scrambler zips through frame right to left. He snags a bunch of bananas as he passes. A few bananas fall to the ground in his wake.
panels.action_es: Ted en el Triumph Scrambler cruza el cuadro de derecha a izquierda. Atrapa un racimo de bananas al pasar. Caen algunas bananas al suelo.
panels.voiceover: Ted (V.O.): Bananas! Good for eating, great for making cars stall out.

panels.description: In foreground, rearview of the two RZRs on either side. They have bananas in their tailpipes and black smoke billowing. There is a person in each car with a fist raised. In middle distance the Excavator arm arches over the jungle path. In the center, the back of the Triumph races up a jungle path.
panels.description_es: En primer plano, vista trasera de los dos RZR a cada lado. Tienen bananas en los caños de escape y humo negro saliendo del auto. Hay una persona en cada auto con el puño levantado. En el medio el brazo del Excavator se arquea sobre el camino. En el centro, la parte trasera del Triumph subiendo por un camino.
panels.action: A>B - The Triumph Scrambler zips into frame followed closely by the two RZRs. The RZRs stop short, jump in place, then black smoke billows. The drivers shake their raised fists. The Excavator arm drops into frame from the right followed by a plume of grey smoke.
panels.action_es: El Triumph Scrambler entra al cuadro seguido de cerca por los dos RZR. Los RZR frenan en seco, saltan en el lugar y echan humo negro. Los conductores agitan los puños. El brazo del Excavator entra desde la derecha seguido de una nube de humo gris.
panels.voiceover: Ted (V.O.): (knavish laughter) Bananas in tailpipes. Gets 'em every time.

panels.description: Facing the jungle. In foreground the Stock Car right at the edge of a cliff, several pieces of rubble falling off the cliff. Above, the Super Hercules facing the foreground.
panels.description_es: Estamos mirando hacia la jungla. En primer plano el Stock Car justo en el borde de un acantilado, varios pedazos de roca cayendo. Arriba el Super Hercules de cara al primer plano.
panels.action: A>B - The plane flies through above as the Stock Car busts out of the jungle and slams on the brakes. It skids all the way to the very edge of the cliff. Pieces of rubble fall out of frame.
panels.action_es: El avión vuela por arriba mientras el Stock Car explota saliendo de la jungla y clava los frenos. Derrapa hasta el borde mismo del acantilado. Caen pedazos de roca fuera de cuadro.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): Whew! Thankfully this car stops as well as it goes. / Charmaine (V.O.): Good news, I found another airstrip. Bad news, it's down there!

panels.description: The Stock Car drives along the cliff's edge. The Super Hercules flies above. The Durango is just a little ways back from the Stock Car.
panels.description_es: El Stock Car maneja por el borde del acantilado. El Super Hercules vuela arriba. El Durango un poco atrás del Stock Car.
panels.action: MOTION MOMENT - Start close on the plane flying low tracking with the Stock Car racing along the cliff's edge. Zoom out to reveal the Dodge Durango racing up behind.
panels.action_es: Empezar cerca del avión volando bajo acompañando al Stock Car por el borde del acantilado. Zoom out para revelar el Dodge Durango acercándose por atrás.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): (narration) Aimee speeds along the rim of the steep cliff, Von Steele close on her tail.

panels.description: Charmaine and Ted are squatted down. They both have their hands on the Mountain Escape Getaway playset and conspiratorial smiles on their faces.
panels.description_es: Charmaine y Ted agachados. Los dos tienen las manos en el playset Mountain Escape Getaway y sonrisas conspirativas.
panels.action: A>B - Ted and Charmaine work together to quietly pull the playset out until it's even with the edge of the table.
panels.action_es: Ted y Charmaine trabajan juntos para sacar el playset en silencio hasta que quede al ras del borde de la mesa.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (O.S.) (V.O.): I could easily get away from Von Steele if I could just find a way down to that airfield.

panels.description: Charmaine holds a car brake disc with some toy vines on it at the edge of the table at the top of the Mountain Escape Getaway playset. In background, Ted is jumping his Triumph Scrambler through the air.
panels.description_es: Charmaine sostiene un disco de freno con lianas de juguete en el borde de la mesa, en la cima del playset Mountain Escape Getaway. Al fondo, Ted hace saltar su Triumph Scrambler.
panels.action: A>B - Charmaine lowers the brake disc into place. Rack focus to the motorcycle in mid-air. Zoom in until the Triumph takes up the whole frame.
panels.action_es: Charmaine baja el disco de freno hasta su lugar. Rack focus a la moto en pleno aire. Zoom in hasta que el Triumph llena el cuadro.
panels.voiceover: Sean (as Von Steele, O.S.) (V.O.): No one can escape the great Von Steele!

panels.description: Ted on his Triumph Scrambler is coming from foreground left. The Durango (with the X crate on it) is coming at the Triumph, chased by Aimee in the Chevy Stock Car.
panels.description_es: Ted en su Triumph Scrambler viene desde el primer plano izquierdo. El Durango (con la caja con X encima) viene hacia el Triumph, perseguido por Aimee en el Chevy Stock Car.
panels.action: A>B - The tires of the Triumph spin as the motorcycle comes into frame. Dust kicks up as it lands. Quickly the Durango and the Stock Car appear and pass the Triumph coming from the opposite direction.
panels.action_es: Las ruedas del Triumph giran al entrar al cuadro. Salta polvo al aterrizar. Rápido aparecen el Durango y el Stock Car y pasan al Triumph desde la dirección contraria.
panels.voiceover: Ted (V.O.): Aimee, I found a secret way off this mountain! / Aimee (V.O.): First we have to get that crate back from Von Steele! / Ted (V.O.): What! How did Von Steele get the crate? / Aimee (V.O.): He chased me, cornered me against some trees, and begged me to sell him the crate. Which was just a distraction while his henchmen stole it. Let's go!

panels.description: The Stock Car is driving close behind the Durango. In foreground left, Von Steele, gritted teeth gripping the wheel of the Durango. Right and back, Aimee super-focused, leaning forward against her seatbelt.
panels.description_es: El Stock Car va muy cerca del Durango. En primer plano izquierdo, Von Steele con dientes apretados aferrando el volante del Durango. A la derecha y atrás, Aimee súper concentrada inclinándose contra el cinturón.
panels.action: MOTION MOMENT - The cars shake as if driving. Background a blur. Starting full-frame on Von Steele. Jump back to view of both cars. Push in on Aimee to full-frame.
panels.action_es: Los autos se sacuden como si manejaran. El fondo es un borrón. Empezar a cuadro completo sobre Von Steele. Salto a vista de ambos autos. Push in sobre Aimee a cuadro completo.
panels.voiceover: Sean (as Von Steele) (V.O.): Not gonna happen. My henchmen are all back in the game. (to the henchmen) Stop her!

panels.description: A tree mid-fall at the viewer. In background, the Excavator has just knocked over the tree that is falling. To the left, tire smoke and dust around the Durango screeching to a halt. The crate is in mid-air flying over the falling tree. The Stock Car is racing under the tree, almost clear.
panels.description_es: Un árbol cayendo hacia el espectador. Al fondo, el Excavator acaba de tirar el árbol que está cayendo. A la izquierda, humo de neumáticos y polvo alrededor del Durango frenando en seco. El cofre vuela por el aire sobre el árbol cayendo. El Stock Car corre por debajo del árbol, casi pasando.
panels.action: A>B - The Durango screeches to a halt to avoid the falling tree, the short stop sends the crate flying. The Stock Car speeds up and safely drives under the falling tree, catching the crate on its trunk on the other side.
panels.action_es: El Durango frena en seco para evitar el árbol cayendo, la frenada manda el cofre por el aire. El Stock Car acelera y pasa con seguridad debajo del árbol cayendo, atrapando el cofre en el techo del otro lado.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): (narration) Aimee uses her speed to zip under the falling tree and catch the crate. (as Aimee) Yes! / Sean (as Von Steele) (V.O.): You stopped ME, you fools!

panels.description: From behind the Stock Car (with the crate) in foreground, the Triumph is in a wheelie next to a vine-covered stone wall in background. INSET: The front tire of the Triumph hitting a stone lever.
panels.description_es: Desde atrás del Stock Car (con el cofre) en primer plano, el Triumph en wheelie junto a un muro de piedra cubierto de enredaderas al fondo. INSET: la rueda delantera del Triumph golpeando una palanca de piedra.
panels.action: A>B - The Stock Car moves forward toward the stone wall as the Triumph rides a wheelie past the stone wall perpendicularly. The circular stone wall rolls open. INSET: the Triumph tire flips the stone lever.
panels.action_es: El Stock Car avanza hacia el muro de piedra mientras el Triumph va en wheelie pasando perpendicular al muro. El muro circular de piedra se abre rodando. INSET: la rueda del Triumph activa la palanca de piedra.
panels.voiceover: Ted (V.O.): Floor it Aimee! There's a secret path entrance right here! / Aimee (V.O.): Ted, that secret path looks a lot like a stone wall! / Ted (V.O.): Looks can be deceiving. Watch this!

panels.description: Reverse of the open stone wall. The top third of the Adventure World version of the Mountain Escape Getaway playset. The Stock Car is coming around the second turn, the Triumph is coming around the first turn.
panels.description_es: Vista contraria del muro de piedra abierto. El tercio superior de la versión Adventure World del playset Mountain Escape Getaway. El Stock Car viene tomando la segunda curva, el Triumph tomando la primera curva.
panels.action: MOTION MOMENT - From the WS the vehicles move forward as much as they can. Pop zoom on Aimee in the Stock Car focused, turning the wheel left into the curve. Pop zoom on the Triumph leaning into the curve.
panels.action_es: Desde el WS los vehículos avanzan lo más posible. Pop zoom sobre Aimee en el Stock Car concentrada girando el volante a la izquierda en la curva. Pop zoom sobre el Triumph inclinándose en la curva.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): Amazing, Ted. Let's get to that plane. / Ted (V.O.): (narration) Aimee and Ted race down the tight turns of secret getaway road.

panels.description: Aimee in the Stock Car mid-air of the second turn jump. Rubble spills from the rock ledge she just took off from. Aimee's face is full of joy.
panels.description_es: Aimee en el Stock Car en el aire del salto de la segunda curva. Caen piedras del borde rocoso desde donde despegó. Cara llena de alegría.
panels.action: A>B - Track with the Stock Car from take off to landing on the next section of road. Show rubble falling after take off and dust and dirt spitting up on the landing.
panels.action_es: Acompañar al Stock Car desde el despegue hasta el aterrizaje en la siguiente sección de camino. Mostrar piedras cayendo después del despegue y polvo saltando al aterrizar.
panels.voiceover: Ted (V.O.): (narration) Aimee floors it to jump a huge gap in the road! / Aimee (V.O.): Whee!

panels.description: The full Mountain Escape Getaway. From the top: two RZRs in the first turn, the Durango making the second turn jump, the Triumph making the third turn jump, the Stock Car with the crate shooting out the bottom ramp.
panels.description_es: El Mountain Escape Getaway completo. Desde arriba: los dos RZR en la primera curva, el Durango haciendo el salto de la segunda curva, el Triumph haciendo el salto de la tercera curva, el Stock Car con el cofre saliendo disparado por la rampa inferior.
panels.action: A>B - From EWS, pop in to the RZRs awkwardly bumping into the side of the ramp wall, dust flying. Drop down to the Durango making the jump and landing, shocks bouncing. Drop down to the Triumph landing its jump with a short skid. Drop down to the Stock Car shooting out the bottom of the Getaway ramp onto the dirt airstrip.
panels.action_es: Desde el EWS, pop in a los RZR golpeándose torpemente contra la pared de la rampa, vuela polvo. Bajar al Durango haciendo el salto y aterrizando, los amortiguadores rebotan. Bajar al Triumph aterrizando el salto con un derrape corto. Bajar al Stock Car saliendo disparado por la parte de abajo de la rampa Getaway hacia la pista de tierra.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): Whoooooa! / Sean (V.O.): Aghhh! / Ted (V.O.): Yes! / Aimee (V.O.): Whoo-hoo!

panels.description: Side view of the airstrip. The Getaway ramp on the left. The Stock Car with the crate is in the middle of the frame racing toward the Super Hercules with its rear cargo door open on the left.
panels.description_es: Vista lateral de la pista. La rampa Getaway a la izquierda. El Stock Car con el cofre en el centro del cuadro corriendo hacia el avión Super Hercules con su puerta trasera de carga abierta a la izquierda.
panels.action: A>B - A dirt-cloud trails the Stock Car as it speeds from the bottom of the Getaway ramp to the Super Hercules plane. The rear cargo door on the Super Hercules lowers.
panels.action_es: Una nube de polvo persigue al Stock Car mientras corre desde la base de la rampa Getaway al Super Hercules. La puerta trasera de carga del Super Hercules se abre.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): We did it! Charmaine, open that rear cargo door. I'm coming in fast. / Charmaine (V.O.): When are you NOT coming in fast?

panels.description: The Super Hercules dominates the top of the frame. Below in background, Von Steele stands on the roof of the Durango with fists raised. INSET: cockpit of the Super Hercules. Charmaine in headset and seatbelt flies the plane. Ted seated next to her as co-pilot clapping. Between them Aimee is seated, arms raised in victory. All have big smiles.
panels.description_es: El Super Hercules domina el tope del cuadro. Abajo al fondo, Von Steele parado en el techo del Durango con los puños levantados. INSET: cabina del Super Hercules.
