panels.description: MS high angle. Crosby standing in the middle of the kids sitting on the floor. He is holding the Excavator high in the foreground, filling half the frame.
panels.description_es: MS ángulo alto. Crosby de pie en el centro de los chicos sentados en el suelo. Sostiene la Excavadora en alto en el primer plano llenando la mitad del cuadro.
panels.action: The Excavator starts in the middle of the frame and shoots up as if Crosby is raising his arm.
panels.action_es: La Excavadora empieza en el centro del cuadro y sale disparada hacia arriba como si Crosby levantara el brazo.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): New plan! We're gonna build ourselves out!

panels.description: GRAPHIC. Adventure World version of Crosby's blueprints on slick blue graph paper. Shows the building in the cavern and a steep ramp built between the building and the opposite cavern wall.
panels.description_es: GRÁFICO. La versión del Mundo de Aventura de los planos de Crosby: papel milimetrado azul, líneas limpias y profesionales. Muestra el edificio en la caverna y una rampa empinada entre el edificio y la pared opuesta de la caverna.
panels.action: The original blueprint of the building transforms into the blueprint with the building in the cavern. The ramp appears, growing from the bottom up.
panels.action_es: El plano original del edificio se transforma en el plano con el edificio en la caverna. La rampa aparece, creciendo desde abajo hacia arriba.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): We can use our construction materials and trucks to build a ramp all the way up.

panels.description: MS vehicle level (underground construction site, well-lit). Aimee in the Bulldozer pushing a huge pile of muddy dirt. INSET: Sean in the Rover 6x6 backing up, using winch to pull sheets of plywood into a ramp.
panels.description_es: MS a nivel de vehículo (subterráneo). Aimee en el Bulldozer empujando tierra lodosa. INSERTO: Sean en el Rover 6x6 en reversa, usando el cabrestante para jalar planchas de contrachapado.
panels.action: Mud splatters on camera as the Bulldozer pushes dirt through the frame. INSET: The Rover 6x6 backs through frame, winch pulling plywood into a ramp. Dissolve to...
panels.action_es: El barro salpica la cámara mientras el Bulldozer empuja tierra. INSERTO: El Rover 6x6 retrocede, el cabrestante jalando contrachapado para la rampa. Fundido a...
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): Aimee, please start pushing all the dirt you can between the building and the cavern wall. / Aimee (V.O.): On it, chief! / Crosby (V.O.): Sean, please pull those sheets of plywood into a ramp. / Sean (V.O.): Sure thing, sir. You're the man with the plan!

panels.description: WS side view. The crew is up to the 7th floor. A platform bridges the ramp and building. The Excavator supports the platform from below with its bucket as the other vehicles cross to the building.
panels.description_es: WS vista lateral. Equipo en el 7° piso. Plataforma entre la rampa y el edificio. La Excavadora soporta la plataforma desde abajo con su balde mientras los demás vehículos cruzan al edificio.
panels.action: The platform between the ramp and the building bows as vehicles cross. The Excavator pushes back to provide support.
panels.action_es: La plataforma entre la rampa y el edificio se flexiona al cruzar los vehículos. La Excavadora empuja para dar soporte.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): (narration) The Excavator supports the platform to get everyone into the building. (as Crosby) The building is more sturdy — more secure to build a ramp up to the top from here. / Aimee (V.O.): Way to go, Crosby! The plan is working!

panels.description: MS 45° high angle looking down from the 7th floor. The Rover 6x6 backed into scaffolding. A single paint can is mid-air falling. INSET: CU of paint can hitting the foot of the crocodile statue at the very bottom of the cavern.
panels.description_es: MS 45° alto desde el 7° piso. El Rover 6x6 retrocede hacia andamiaje. Un bote de pintura cae. INSERTO: CU del bote golpeando el pie del cocodrilo en el fondo de la caverna.
panels.action: The Rover 6x6 bumps scaffolding, sending a paint can falling. INSET: CU of paint can hitting the foot of the crocodile statue at the very bottom of the cavern.
panels.action_es: El Rover 6x6 golpea el andamio haciendo caer un bote de pintura. INSERTO: CU del bote golpeando el pie de la estatua del cocodrilo.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): (narration) But Sean bumps some scaffolding, sending a paint can falling to the bottom of the cavern. / Sean (V.O.): Whoops. Well, it's just a little paint can. Shouldn't cause any problems.

panels.description: CU at 8th floor level, 3/4 view of the giant stone crocodile's mouth. Water is pouring out of the mouth and spilling into the cavern below.
panels.description_es: CU a nivel del 8° piso, vista de 3/4 de la boca del gigante cocodrilo de piedra. Hay agua brotando de la boca.
panels.action: The stone mouth opens and water starts pouring out.
panels.action_es: La boca de piedra se abre y el agua comienza a salir.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): Uh-oh. Crosby the crocodile head is now spurting water. The cavern is filling up fast.

panels.description: GRAPHIC. Previous cavern ramp blueprint now shows a bridge going from the top of the ramp, through the 8th floor of the building, ending on top of the Crocodile head to stop the water flow.
panels.description_es: GRÁFICO. El plano anterior de la rampa de la caverna ahora muestra un puente que va desde la parte superior de la rampa, a través del 8° piso del edificio y termina sobre la cabeza del Cocodrilo para cerrar el flujo de agua.
panels.action: The previous blueprint transforms into the blueprint with the bridge. Bridge sections click into place.
panels.action_es: El plano anterior se transforma en el plano con el puente. Las secciones del puente encajan en su lugar.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): (narration) Crosby quickly revises the blueprints to make a bridge through the building to the crocodile head to turn off the water.

panels.description: MWS high angle. From the Rescue Helicopter in the foreground, Charmaine looks down. Crosby's Excavator visible near the edge of the 7th floor across from the Crocodile. Below, water is about up to the 3rd floor.
panels.description_es: MWS alto. Desde el Helicóptero de Rescate en primer plano, Charmaine mira hacia abajo. La Excavadora de Crosby visible cerca del borde del 7° piso frente al Cocodrilo brotando agua. Abajo, el agua llega al 3° piso aproximadamente.
panels.action: The Helicopter hovers. The water rises a little.
panels.action_es: El Helicóptero flota en el aire. El agua sube un poco.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): There's not enough time. That water is rising super fast, Crosby. What do we do?

panels.description: MS side view. Kids playing on the floor. Crosby on one side of the DIY building, crumpling his handmade blueprints. Charmaine on the other side shaking a blue streamer attached to the homemade crocodile mouth.
panels.description_es: MS vista lateral. Los chicos jugando en el suelo. Crosby de un lado del edificio DIY, arrugando sus planos caseros. Charmaine del otro lado sacudiendo un serpentín azul que fijó a la boca del cocodrilo casero.
panels.action: Start close on the crocodile head with the wiggling streamer. Pull out to reveal the whole image. Charmaine's cheeks puff out and deflate.
panels.action_es: Empezamos cerca de la cabeza de cocodrilo con el serpentín agitándose. Nos alejamos para revelar la imagen completa. Las mejillas de Charmaine se inflan y desinflan.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): Urgh! Every time I make a plan, something changes.

panels.description: MS at kid level. Charmaine standing next to Crosby with her hand on his back. He looks a little disappointed. She looks at him with genuine care for a friend.
panels.description_es: MS a nivel de niños. Charmaine de pie junto a Crosby con la mano en su espalda. Él parece un poco decepcionado. Ella lo mira con genuina preocupación por un amigo.
panels.action: Charmaine's head tilts to the side as her hand pats Crosby's back.
panels.action_es: La cabeza de Charmaine se inclina a un lado mientras su mano da palmaditas en la espalda de Crosby.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): Crosby, maybe adventure is what happens outside of the blueprints.

panels.description: MS 20° high angle looking down at the floor play area. Crosby behind the DIY building and crocodile. Face excited, hands spread wide framing the space between the building and the crocodile.
panels.description_es: MS 20° alto mirando hacia abajo el área de juego en el suelo. Crosby detrás del edificio DIY y el cocodrilo. Cara entusiasmada y manos abiertas enmarcando el espacio entre el edificio y el cocodrilo.
panels.action: Crosby's head and hands rise up behind the building play area.
panels.action_es: La cabeza y las manos de Crosby se elevan detrás del área de juego del edificio.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): No blueprints? Okay. I can do that. Let's go!

panels.description: MS vehicle level, 20° low angle. Crosby in the Excavator looking up toward the top of the cavern. Hands up as if waving.
panels.description_es: MS a nivel del vehículo, 20° ángulo bajo. Crosby en la Excavadora mira hacia la parte superior de la caverna. Sus manos arriba como saludando.
panels.action: Crosby's head tilts up and his arms wave.
panels.action_es: La cabeza de Crosby se inclina hacia arriba y sus brazos se agitan.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): Charmaine! Hop in the crane and lower the vehicle platform!

panels.description: WS 8th floor. The crane's vehicle platform directly in the middle of the gap between the 8th floor and the crocodile's head (still spouting water). INSET: Charmaine in crane cab, gripping the gears and peering down.
panels.description_es: WS 8° piso. La plataforma de vehículos de la grúa directamente en el centro del espacio entre el 8° piso del edificio y la cabeza del cocodrilo (aún brotando agua). INSERTO Charmaine en la cabina de la grúa sosteniendo los engranajes y mirando hacia abajo.
panels.action: The crane platform lowers into place. The Excavator backs up a bit. INSET: Charmaine's arms work the crane's gears.
panels.action_es: La plataforma de la grúa baja a su posición. La Excavadora retrocede un poco. INSERTO: los brazos de Charmaine trabajan con los engranajes de la grúa.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): (narration) Crosby tells the squad his wild plan to use the crane's platform to reach the croc's head. / Charmaine (V.O.): I don't think that will reach.

panels.description: MS 3/4 view of Excavator facing camera, bucket arm in foreground. Behind it the other vehicles spread out. Excavator rocks back and forth preparing for the charge.
panels.description_es: MS vista de 3/4 de la Excavadora de frente a la cámara, el brazo balde en el primer plano. Detrás los demás vehículos extendidos. La Excavadora se tambalea preparándose para la arrancada.
panels.action: The Excavator moves back a small amount and stops. Smoke puffs from its exhaust. It lurches forward.
panels.action_es: La Excavadora retrocede un poco y se detiene. Humo sale del escape. Luego arranca hacia adelante.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): It will if we swing across the gap. / Ted (V.O.): In what? / Crosby (V.O.): The Excavator! / ALL (V.O.): The Excavator?

panels.description: MWS 3/4 side angle. Excavator "racing" toward the edge of the building. Sean in the Rover 6x6 bumping the Excavator from behind. Speed lines.
panels.description_es: MWS vista lateral de 3/4. La Excavadora "a toda velocidad" hacia el borde del edificio. Sean en el Rover 6x6 golpeando la Excavadora desde atrás. Líneas de velocidad.
panels.action: The Excavator is moving. The Bulldozer bumps it from behind and stays with it. The speed of the Excavator increases.
panels.action_es: La Excavadora se mueve. El Bulldozer la golpea por detrás y se mantiene con ella. La velocidad de la Excavadora aumenta.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Here's a boost, Crosby! You can do this!

panels.description: MWS 8th floor, side view of the gap between the building and the crane platform. Excavator mid-air with bucket arm fully extended. Bucket just above and behind the platform. INSET: CU of bucket sinking its teeth into the platform, splinters flying.
panels.description_es: MWS 8° piso, vista lateral del espacio entre el edificio y la plataforma de la grúa. La Excavadora en el aire con el brazo balde completamente extendido. El balde justo sobre y detrás de la plataforma. INSERTO: CU del balde hundiéndose en la plataforma.
panels.action: The Excavator moves in slow motion through the gap. The bucket hooks on the platform. INSET: the bucket sinks into the wooden platform and splinters fly.
panels.action_es: La Excavadora se mueve en cámara lenta a través del espacio. El balde se engancha en la plataforma. INSERTO: el balde se hunde en la plataforma de madera y las astillas vuelan.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): (narration) The bucket arm just barely catches the platform.

panels.description: EWS side view showing the full gap between the building and the crocodile. Excavator with bucket arm attached to the platform at the 9 o'clock position. Arc trajectory line visible.
panels.description_es: EWS vista lateral, el espacio completo entre el edificio y el cocodrilo. La Excavadora con el brazo balde unido a la plataforma a las 9 en punto entre el edificio y el cocodrilo. Línea de trayectoria visible.
panels.action: The Excavator with the bucket arm attached to the platform swings from 9 o'clock to 3 o'clock through the gap like a hero on a bullwhip.
panels.action_es: La Excavadora con el brazo balde unido a la plataforma se balancea de las 9 a las 3 en punto como un héroe en un látigo.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): The huge Excavator swings through the air. / ALL (V.O.): GO CROSBY!

panels.description: WS 8th floor, gap between the building and the crocodile. Excavator upside-down mid-air above and past the platform. Double backflip in the gap, heading toward the crocodile head.
panels.description_es: WS 8° piso, espacio entre el edificio y el cocodrilo. La Excavadora boca abajo, en el aire, pasando por encima de la plataforma. Doble mortal hacia atrás en el espacio.
panels.action: The Excavator does two full backflips mid-air as it ascends above and over the crocodile head.
panels.action_es: La Excavadora hace dos giros completos hacia atrás en el aire mientras asciende sobre y por encima de la cabeza del cocodrilo.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): (narration) Crosby does a double backflip, in the Excavator! / Crosby (V.O.): Whoa! whOA! Whooooa!

panels.description: MS 3/4 view of the crocodile head. Excavator right-side-up a foot above the head, mouth still spouting water. INSET: CU on Crosby in the cab, gripping the wheel, face half determined half freaked out.
panels.description_es: MS vista de 3/4 de la cabeza del cocodrilo. La Excavadora justo arriba de la cabeza, boca del cocodrilo aún brotando agua. INSERTO: CU de Crosby en la cabina aferrando el volante, cara mitad determinada mitad aterrada.
panels.action: The Excavator lands with a world-shaking thunk on the head. The crocodile mouth closes and the water stops. INSET: pops up as the Excavator lands.
panels.action_es: La Excavadora aterriza con un estruendo que sacude el mundo sobre la cabeza. La boca del cocodrilo se cierra y el agua se detiene. INSERTO: aparece cuando la Excavadora aterriza.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): (narration) He lands perfectly on the crocodile head and stops the water flow. / Crosby (V.O.): Ooof! Yes! Nailed it!

panels.description: COMPOSITE. 5-panel CU of each kid in their vehicles going nuts. Crosby has a huge look of relief.
panels.description_es: COMPOSITE. 5 paneles con CU de cada chico en sus vehículos enloquecidos. Crosby con una enorme expresión de alivio.
panels.action: The kids move back and forth with enthusiasm. Crosby has a huge look of relief.
panels.action_es: Los chicos se mueven hacia adelante y atrás con entusiasmo. Crosby tiene una enorme expresión de alivio.
panels.voiceover: ALL (V.O.): (cheering) Way to go Crosby! You did it! Wow! Do it again!

panels.description: WS 20° high angle. Building roof even with ground level. Vehicle access ramps on all four sides of the roof leading from the ground across the cavern gap. The Squad surrounded by their vehicles in the middle of the roof.
panels.description_es: WS 20° alto. El techo del edificio a nivel del suelo. Hay rampas de acceso vehicular en los cuatro lados del techo que llevan desde el nivel del suelo a través del espacio de la caverna hasta el techo. El escuadrón rodeado de sus vehículos en el centro del techo.
panels.action: Pull out from the roof top to reveal that the building is still in the cavern and the roof is even with the surface of the Earth.
panels.action_es: Nos alejamos del techo para revelar que el edificio sigue en la caverna y el techo queda a nivel con la superficie de la Tierra.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): We've created the world's first ever underground skyscraper. / Ted (V.O.): I think you mean "ground"-scraper. / ALL (V.O.): (cheers, laughter, groans)

panels.description: MS at kid level. Squad with big smiles posing for a photo surrounded by construction vehicles. Crosby center. INSETS: 42B Sean splashing water at base of building. 42C Aimee taking a low-angle wide selfie. 42D Ted impersonating the crocodile head out a window.
panels.description_es: MS a nivel de niños. El Escuadrón con grandes sonrisas posando para una foto, rodeados de los vehículos de construcción. Crosby al centro. INSERTOS: 42B Sean salpicando agua. 42C Aimee tomándose una selfie panorámica. 42D Ted imitando la cabeza del cocodrilo por la ventana del 8° piso.
panels.action: Everyone leans heads and bodies in toward each other as the camera flashes. The frame tilts on the vertical axis to reveal the captured photo. Camera flashes reveal the inset images.
panels.action_es: Todos inclinan cabezas y cuerpos uno hacia el otro mientras la cámara dispara. El cuadro se inclina revelando la foto capturada. Los destellos revelan las imágenes del inserto.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): With a huge pool. / Aimee (V.O.): Great views. / Ted (V.O.): And weird art!

panels.description: MS helicopter level, 3/4 side angle. Charmaine flying Rescue Helicopter in left foreground with Crosby as passenger. Both looking down. Right BG: high angle view of the building top and cavern opening. Match-cut to...
panels.description_es: MS a nivel del helicóptero, vista de 3/4 lateral. Charmaine piloteando el Helicóptero de Rescate en el primer plano izquierdo con Crosby como pasajero. Ambos mirando hacia abajo. A la derecha al fondo, vista del techo del edificio y la abertura de la caverna.
panels.action: From a full view of the building top and cavern opening, the helicopter flies into frame.
panels.action_es: Desde una vista completa del techo del edificio y la abertura de la caverna, el helicóptero entra al cuadro.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): You did something pretty amazing with no blueprints.

panels.description: MS 3/4 side view of Charmaine flying the Rescue Helicopter over the building play area. Crosby next to her. The DIY skyscraper and homemade crocodile in table foreground.
panels.description_es: MS vista de 3/4 lateral de Charmaine volando el Helicóptero de Rescate sobre el área de juego del edificio. Crosby a su lado. El rascacielos DIY y el cocodrilo casero en el primer plano de la mesa.
panels.action: Charmaine's arm moves the Rescue Helicopter through the frame over the building play area.
panels.action_es: El brazo de Charmaine mueve el Helicóptero de Rescate a través del cuadro sobre el área de juego del edificio.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): I couldn't have done it without the best construction crew in the city!

panels.description: MWS 20° high angle looking down. Kids side-by-side behind the building and crocodile play area. Right to left: Sean/Rover 6x6, Aimee/Mustang Fastback, Crosby/Excavator, Charmaine/Rescue Helicopter, Ted/Triumph Scrambler.
panels.description_es: MWS 20° alto mirando hacia abajo. Los chicos uno al lado del otro detrás del área de juego del edificio y el cocodrilo. De derecha a izquierda: Sean/Rover 6x6, Aimee/Mustang Fastback, Crosby/Excavadora, Charmaine/Helicóptero de Rescate, Ted/Triumph Scrambler.
panels.action: In rapid succession the arms holding the vehicles rise into position. As the last one hits its mark we slowly pull out.
panels.action_es: En rápida sucesión los brazos sosteniendo los vehículos se elevan a su posición. Cuando el último llega a su marca, nos alejamos lentamente.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): Nothing can stop the... / ALL (V.O.): MATCHBOX ADVENTURE SQUAD!

panels.description: Charmaine in a Toyota Tacoma on a ridge in the foreground. In the background a volcano, resembling the Mountain Escape Getaway playset, erupts.
panels.description_es: Charmaine en una Toyota Tacoma en una cresta en primer plano. Al fondo, un volcán (que se parece al playset Mountain Escape Getaway) entra en erupción.
panels.action: The Toyota Tacoma skids to a stop on the ridge, kicking up dust. The ground shakes as black smoke billows from the top of the volcano.
panels.action_es: La Toyota Tacoma derrapa hasta detenerse en la cresta, levantando polvo. El suelo tiembla mientras humo negro sale del volcán.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): (narration) Just as Charmaine starts off to claim the mountain treasure, the volcano erupts!

panels.description: Looking through windshield at Charmaine, surprise on her face. Passenger side reflects the volcano eruption. INSET: Classic wooden/metal treasure chest.
panels.description_es: Vista a través del parabrisas de Charmaine con cara de sorpresa. El lado del copiloto refleja la erupción. INSET: un cofre de tesoro clásico.
panels.action: Charmaine straightens up and her eyes go wide. The eruption plays in the windshield reflection. We push in on her face. INSET: The treasure chest grows from a twinkle in her eye to fill half the frame.
panels.action_es: Charmaine se endereza y abre los ojos. La erupción se refleja en el parabrisas. Push in sobre su cara. INSET: el cofre crece desde un destello en su ojo hasta llenar medio cuadro.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): I have to rescue that ancient treasure before the volcano destroys it!

panels.description: Title card. Matchbox Crew logo with episode title zips into position.
panels.description_es: Placa de título. Logo Matchbox Crew con el título del episodio.
panels.action: The title zips into position as Charmaine says the title.
panels.action_es: El título se desliza a su posición mientras Charmaine lo dice.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): The Matchbox Crew Volcano Treasure!

panels.description: Composite of the five kids in five vertical columns style-matched to title card. Each character's name splashes over their image.
panels.description_es: Composite de los cinco chicos en cinco columnas verticales combinadas al estilo del título. Los nombres de cada personaje aparecen sobre su imagen.
panels.action: Five singles stack vertically to form a split-screen of the whole team. Sean, Aimee, Ted, Crosby and Charmaine, "caught" in candid play with their hero vehicles.
panels.action_es: Cinco singles se apilan verticalmente formando una pantalla dividida de todo el equipo. Sean, Aimee, Ted, Crosby y Charmaine "capturados" jugando con sus vehículos héroes.

panels.description: Pro mechanic's garage converted into ultimate Matchbox play space. In the middle: miniature toy volcano (Mountain Escape Getaway with DIY modifications). Charmaine pushes mini Toyota Tacoma UP the volcano. The other kids lean in.
panels.description_es: Taller de mecánico convertido en espacio de juego Matchbox. En el centro, versión miniatura del volcán (Mountain Escape Getaway con modificaciones DIY). Charmaine empuja la versión miniatura de la Toyota Tacoma hacia arriba del volcán.
panels.action: MOMENT MOTION - We pull out from the volcano. It lowers in the foreground as Charmaine and the other kids rise in the background.
panels.action_es: Nos alejamos del volcán. Baja en primer plano mientras Charmaine y los otros chicos suben al fondo.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): (as the truck) Vroom! (then) Everyone needs their toughest vehicle for this adventure.

panels.description: Sean and Aimee leaned in close. Charmaine stands behind them hands on hips. Sean points at top of volcano, Aimee points at DIY treasure chest on the first turn.
panels.description_es: Sean y Aimee se inclinan cerca. Charmaine detrás de ellos con las manos en la cintura. Sean apunta al tope del volcán y Aimee al cofre DIY en la curva.
panels.action: Aimee's hand juts out. Sean's hand juts out.
panels.action_es: La mano de Aimee sale disparada. La mano de Sean sale disparada.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): That's the treasure? / Sean (V.O.): That's sooo close to the exploding volcano? / Charmaine (V.O.): Yep. So there's not a second to waste.

panels.description: Side view of five vehicles lined up at the base of the volcano: Toyota Tacoma, Rover 6x6 Distressed, F-150, Polaris RZR, Triumph Scrambler. INSET: CU of Charmaine with excited face.
panels.description_es: Vista lateral de cinco vehículos alineados en la base del volcán: Toyota Tacoma, Rover 6x6 Distressed, F-150, Polaris RZR y Triumph Scrambler. INSET: CU de Charmaine con cara entusiasmada.
panels.action: Push in on the vehicles. INSET: pull out from Charmaine's face.
panels.action_es: Push in sobre los vehículos. INSET: pull out desde la cara de Charmaine.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): Follow me!

panels.description: Five cars in same order, speed lines, road dust. Toyota Tacoma (Charmaine), Rover 6x6 (Sean), F-150 (Crosby), Polaris RZR (Aimee), Triumph Scrambler (Ted). INSET: Charmaine's excited and focused face driving.
panels.description_es: Los cinco autos en el mismo orden, líneas de velocidad, polvo. Toyota Tacoma (Charmaine), Rover 6x6 (Sean), F-150 (Crosby), Polaris RZR (Aimee), Triumph Scrambler (Ted). INSET: cara emocionada y concentrada de Charmaine manejando.
panels.action: A>B - Match zoom to the vehicles rumbling and shaking through frame. INSET: Match zoom in on Charmaine now jostling behind the wheel of the Toyota Tacoma.
panels.action_es: Match zoom a los vehículos retumbando y sacudiéndose al pasar. INSET: match zoom sobre Charmaine sacudiéndose al volante de la Toyota Tacoma.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): (narration) Charmaine leads the crew up the narrow volcano mountain pass to the treasure.

panels.description: We are below Charmaine in the Toyota Tacoma, mid-air, jumping a gap in the mountain pass.
panels.description_es: Estamos debajo de Charmaine en la Toyota Tacoma, en el aire, saltando un hueco en el paso de montaña.
panels.action: A>B - The camera pans with the Tacoma as it jumps over the road gap from the right side of the frame to the left side. Rocks and sand fall from jump point.
panels.action_es: La cámara acompaña a la Tacoma saltando un hueco en el camino. Caen rocas y arena.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): WhooOA! This shaking volcano is making the road tough.

panels.description: All five vehicles hug the outside of the road. A thin stream of steamy, bubbling lava flows down the inside.
panels.description_es: Los cinco vehículos abrazan el exterior del camino. Un fino chorro de lava humeante y burbujeante fluye por el interior del camino.
panels.action: The vehicles move along their curve while the lava moves the opposite direction on its curve. The lava bubbles and steams.
panels.action_es: Los vehículos avanzan por su curva mientras la lava fluye en dirección opuesta. La lava burbujea y humea.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): (narration) Everyone stay to the outside to avoid the lava. / Crosby (V.O.): Lava!

panels.description: Sean looks out his passenger side window with concern.
panels.description_es: Sean mira preocupado por la ventana del copiloto.
panels.action: The passenger side window of Sean's Rover 6x6 lowers as the Rover moves left to right. Heat lines distort the image.
panels.action_es: La ventana del copiloto del Rover 6x6 de Sean baja mientras el Rover cruza de izquierda a derecha. Líneas de calor distorsionan la imagen.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): We need to get that treasure and get off this mountain fast.

panels.description: Toyota Tacoma, Rover 6x6, F-150, Polaris RZR and Triumph Scrambler speed along a straightway in the incline. INSET: CU on Aimee with excited look.
panels.description_es: Toyota Tacoma, Rover 6x6, F-150, Polaris RZR y Triumph Scrambler corren por una recta en la pendiente. INSET: CU de Aimee con cara entusiasmada.
panels.action: The vehicles rock and shake as they power up the mountain.
panels.action_es: Los vehículos se balancean y sacuden mientras suben la montaña.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): If we need to go fast, let's make this a race!

panels.description: The Toyota Tacoma, Rover 6x6, F-150, Polaris RZR and Triumph Scrambler transform into 1971 Dodge Challenger (Charmaine), Mustang Fastback (Sean), Porsche 911 (Crosby), Chevy Stock Car (Aimee). Scrambler stays the same.
panels.description_es: La Toyota Tacoma, Rover 6x6, F-150, Polaris RZR y Triumph Scrambler se transforman en 1971 Dodge Challenger (Charmaine), Mustang Fastback (Sean), Porsche 911 (Crosby), Chevy Stock Car (Aimee). El Scrambler sigue igual.
panels.action: The previous frame dissolves into this frame. As soon as it resolves all race cars zip off frame upper left.
panels.action_es: El cuadro anterior se funde en este. Al resolverse, todos los autos de carrera se disparan hacia arriba a la izquierda.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): Welcome to the Volcano Treasure Rally Race! Go!

panels.description: Charmaine in 1971 Dodge Challenger and Aimee in Chevy Stock Car side by side. Looking through windshields. Aimee's face excited, Charmaine's brow knitted.
panels.description_es: Charmaine en el 1971 Dodge Challenger y Aimee en el Chevy Stock Car lado a lado. Vista a través de los parabrisas. Aimee emocionada, Charmaine con el ceño fruncido.
panels.action: Aimee's image moves a little closer to camera, Charmaine's image fades back a little. The cars shake on the rough road.
panels.action_es: La imagen de Aimee se acerca un poco a cámara, la de Charmaine se aleja. Los autos se sacuden en el camino rocoso.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): Aimee what are you doing? / Aimee (V.O.): I'm winning the race to the treasure. See ya at the top.

panels.description: Charmaine holds her Toyota Tacoma in her left hand. In foreground, Aimee drops the Dodge Challenger into Charmaine's right hand.
panels.description_es: Charmaine sostiene su Toyota Tacoma en la mano izquierda. En primer plano, Aimee deja caer el Dodge Challenger en la mano derecha de Charmaine.
panels.action: The Dodge Challenger drops from Aimee's hands into Charmaine's open right hand.
panels.action_es: El Dodge Challenger cae de las manos de Aimee a la mano derecha abierta de Charmaine.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): Aimee this is suppose to be a treasure adventure. / Aimee (V.O.): Yeah, a fast treasure adventure!

panels.description: Charmaine and Aimee's heads on either side of the DIY volcano.
panels.description_es: Las cabezas de Charmaine y Aimee a ambos lados del volcán DIY.
panels.action: The faces of Charmaine and Aimee are revealed as we zoom out from the foreshortened volcano.
panels.action_es: Las caras de Charmaine y Aimee se revelan mientras nos alejamos del volcán en escorzo.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): That volcano looks pretty dangerous. A race might actually keep us safe.

panels.description: All the kids are holding up their race vehicles. Charmaine in the middle. Their faces are happy and energized.
panels.description_es: Todos los chicos sostienen sus vehículos de carrera. Charmaine en el medio. Caras felices y energizadas.
panels.action: Charmaine's arm shoots forward holding the Dodge Challenger.
panels.action_es: El brazo de Charmaine sale disparado hacia adelante sosteniendo el Dodge Challenger.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): Okay. New plan. First person to get the treasure to the bottom of the mountain wins!

panels.description: Cars race up the mountain. Chevy Stock Car in the lead followed by Dodge Challenger, Mustang and Porsche. Triumph Scrambler brings up the rear. INSET: CU on Ted's face, helmet visor up.
panels.description_es: Los autos suben la montaña a toda velocidad. Chevy Stock Car adelante, seguido por Dodge Challenger, Mustang y Porsche. Triumph Scrambler al final. INSET: CU de la cara de Ted con la visera del casco levantada.
panels.action: The Scrambler races past all of the cars on the inside.
panels.action_es: El Scrambler pasa a todos los autos por adentro.
panels.voiceover: Ted (V.O.): (playing announcer) The volcano is hot, but the racing is even hotter. It's neck and neck with big stakes. Aimee is in the lead and going strong.

panels.description: The Dodge Challenger, on the inside, is just in front of the Chevy Stock Car on the outside.
panels.description_es: El Dodge Challenger, por dentro, está justo delante del Chevy Stock Car por fuera.
panels.action: The Dodge Challenger passes the Chevy.
panels.action_es: El Dodge Challenger pasa al Chevy.
panels.voiceover: Ted (V.O.): (playing announcer) Hold on race fans. Charmaine speeds up and passes Aimee on the inside!

panels.description: Charmaine in the Challenger driving towards camera. She looks up, shocked. Aimee in the Chevy Stock Car jumping over the Challenger from a raised, perpendicular, side road.
panels.description_es: Charmaine en el Challenger conduciendo hacia cámara, mirando hacia arriba, impactada. Aimee en el Chevy Stock Car saltando sobre el Challenger desde un camino lateral elevado y perpendicular.
panels.action: Aimee in the Stock Car jumps over Charmaine's Challenger as we pull out from Charmaine's face.
panels.action_es: Aimee en el Stock Car salta sobre el Challenger de Charmaine mientras nos alejamos de la cara de Charmaine.
panels.voiceover: Ted (V.O.): (playing announcer) WHOA! Aimee takes a shortcut, end around and actually jumps over Charmaine!

panels.description: Aimee's Stock Car points toward center at 45° from left. Charmaine's Challenger points toward center at 45° from right. Stock Car has treasure chest strapped on the back. INSET: CU Aimee smiling, giving a friendly wave.
panels.description_es: El Stock Car de Aimee apunta al centro a 45° desde la izquierda. El Challenger de Charmaine apunta al centro a 45° desde la derecha. El Stock Car lleva el cofre del tesoro atado atrás. INSET: CU de Aimee sonriendo y saludando amigable.
panels.action: The Stock Car zips in from the left. The Challenger zips in from the right. The Stock Car zips out to the right, filling the frame.
panels.action_es: El Stock Car entra desde la izquierda. El Challenger entra desde la derecha. El Stock Car sale por la derecha llenando el cuadro.
panels.voiceover: Ted (V.O.): (playing announcer) Aimee has snagged the treasure! / Aimee (V.O.): (to Charmaine) Hey, there Charmaine. What took ya so long? I'd love to stay and chat, but I've got a race to win. See ya at the bottom. / Charmaine (V.O.): Aimee, you can't take shortcuts!

panels.description: Charmaine has her arms crossed and her mouth pursed. The other kids are still bent over the table.
panels.description_es: Charmaine con los brazos cruzados y la boca apretada. Los otros chicos siguen inclinados sobre la mesa.
panels.action: The table with the kids moves toward the foreground as Charmaine moves toward the background.
panels.action_es: La mesa con los chicos avanza al primer plano mientras Charmaine retrocede al fondo.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): It's no fun if you change the rules all the time.

panels.description: Aimee holds her Stock Car and hands the Challenger back to Charmaine. Charmaine is laughing.
panels.description_es: Aimee sostiene su Stock Car y le devuelve el Challenger a Charmaine. Charmaine se ríe.
panels.action: Push in on Aimee and Charmaine as Aimee's hand with the Challenger moves toward Charmaine.
panels.action_es: Push in sobre Aimee y Charmaine mientras la mano de Aimee con el Challenger se acerca a Charmaine.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): (genuine) I'm sorry, Charmaine. (teasing) I guess I should have just beat you fair and square. / Charmaine (V.O.): Oh, you are on!

panels.description: Sean pulls a red bandana out of the top of the volcano. The other kids look on with excitement.
panels.description_es: Sean saca una bandana roja del tope del volcán. Los otros chicos miran con emoción.
panels.action: We pull out from the volcano as Sean's arm whips the bandana out.
panels.action_es: Nos alejamos del volcán mientras el brazo de Sean saca la bandana de un tirón.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Whatever we're gonna do, we'd better do it quickly. The volcano just exploded!

panels.description: A comical spurt of lava shoots out of the top of the volcano. At the bottom of frame, the five vehicles near the top of the mountain.
panels.description_es: Un chorro cómico de lava sale del tope del volcán. En la parte baja del cuadro, los cinco vehículos cerca del tope de la montaña.
panels.action: The match dissolve from the bandana resolves with the lava in mid-air. Lava slowly spills over the edge of the top of the volcano.
panels.action_es: El match dissolve de la bandana se resuelve con lava en el aire. Lava derrama lentamente por el borde superior del volcán.
panels.voiceover: Ted (V.O.): (as announcer) There is a new contestant in the race, flowing lava! / Charmaine (V.O.): Let's race!

panels.description: High-angle view of all cars racing around a bend. Aimee's Stock Car with treasure chest leads, followed by Charmaine, Sean, Crosby, finally Ted on the Scrambler.
panels.description_es: Plano alto de todos los autos tomando una curva. El Stock Car de Aimee con el cofre va al frente, seguido por Charmaine, Sean, Crosby y finalmente Ted en el Scrambler.
panels.action: The frame shakes and we push in past Aimee in the foreground to capture the race-focused faces of all the kids.
panels.action_es: El cuadro tiembla y hacemos push in más allá de Aimee en primer plano para capturar las caras concentradas de todos.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): Stay safe everyone. And let us know if you see anything dangerous.

panels.description: Aimee steers around a boulder blocking most of the road.
panels.description_es: Aimee dirige alrededor de una roca que bloquea la mayor parte del camino.
panels.action: The boulder rolls into frame, Aimee's car slides to the outside to avoid it.
panels.action_es: La roca entra rodando al cuadro, el auto de Aimee se desliza hacia afuera para esquivarla.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): Boulder!

panels.description: All of the other cars steering around the boulder. The Scrambler brings up the rear.
panels.description_es: Todos los otros autos esquivan la roca. El Scrambler cierra la comitiva.
panels.action: Dirt spits off the outside of the mountain pass as the cars move in a small arc.
panels.action_es: Polvo salta hacia afuera del paso de montaña mientras los autos se mueven en un pequeño arco.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): Thanks, Aimee! / Ted (V.O.): Everyone narrowly avoids crashing into the giant boulder. Even me!

panels.description: At a bend there is a stream of lava that "washed" away the road. Stock Car and Challenger neck and neck approaching it. INSET: CU of Charmaine's surprised/scared face.
panels.description_es: En una curva del camino hay un río de lava que "borró" el camino. Stock Car y Challenger par a par. INSET: CU de la cara sorprendida/asustada de Charmaine.
panels.action: The two cars slowly move toward the lava stream. INSET: Charmaine's image pops on her line.
panels.action_es: Los dos autos avanzan lentamente hacia el río de lava. INSET: la imagen de Charmaine aparece al hablar.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): Lava! Jump!

panels.description: All cars have jumped and cleared the lava stream. Crosby's car just landing. Ted's motorcycle mid-air.
panels.description_es: Todos los autos saltaron y despejaron el río de lava. El auto de Crosby justo aterriza. La moto de Ted está en el aire.
panels.action: Track with the Porsche landing and the Scrambler right after it.
panels.action_es: Acompañamos al Porsche aterrizando y al Scrambler justo después.
panels.voiceover: Ted (V.O.): (as announcer) This just in. I made it!

panels.description: Aimee and Charmaine are even with each other, but Charmaine's Challenger is taking a hard left onto a side road.
panels.description_es: Aimee y Charmaine a la par, pero el Challenger de Charmaine gira fuerte a la izquierda a un camino lateral.
panels.action: The frame shakes and dust from Charmaine's tires kicks out toward Aimee.
panels.action_es: El cuadro tiembla y el polvo de los neumáticos de Charmaine salpica hacia Aimee.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): (narration) With quick thinking, Charmaine takes a sharp left onto the old fire road. / Aimee (V.O.): Hey! Where's Charmaine going?

panels.description: Charmaine is operating a Rescue Helicopter that is just lifting off from an old run-down rescue station. Charmaine's car is parked at an angle with the driver's side door open.
panels.description_es: Charmaine opera un Rescue Helicopter que despega desde una vieja estación de rescate en ruinas. El auto de Charmaine está estacionado en ángulo con la puerta del conductor abierta.
panels.action: Dust spreads out as the helicopter lifts out of frame.
panels.action_es: Polvo se expande mientras el helicóptero despega y sale de cuadro.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): (narration) She hops in the old Rescue Helicopter and lifts off. (as herself) Time to take this race to the air!

panels.description: Aimee's Stock Car is tilted onto its right-side tires. A rock flying on the left caused it to tip. The treasure chest is flying off the back.
panels.description_es: El Stock Car de Aimee se inclina sobre sus ruedas derechas. A la izquierda, una roca volando que causó el vuelco. El cofre vuela por el aire.
panels.action: As Aimee's car moves through frame it tilts and the treasure chest flies toward camera.
panels.action_es: Al pasar, el auto de Aimee se inclina y el cofre vuela hacia cámara.
panels.voiceover: Ted (V.O.): (as announcer) Oh no, Aimee hits some falling debris and sends that treasure up for grabs!

panels.description: Helicopter-level aerial view. A cable hook from the helicopter is hooked onto the side handle of the treasure chest.
panels.description_es: Vista aérea. Un cable con gancho del helicóptero se engancha en la manija lateral del cofre del tesoro.
panels.action: The treasure chest enters from bottom left. Charmaine's helicopter enters from top right. In center frame, cable hooks the chest.
panels.action_es: El cofre entra por abajo izquierda. Charmaine en helicóptero entra por arriba derecha. En el centro, el cable engancha el cofre.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): Yes! I caught the treasure. / Ted (V.O.): (narration) Yes, but from the air Charmaine spots a new danger.

panels.description: Helicopter POV of mountain side. Main road the cars are on leads to a pool of lava. A side road is visible.
panels.description_es: POV de Charmaine desde el helicóptero. El camino principal lleva a una pileta de lava. Se ve un camino lateral alternativo.
panels.action: Helicopter POV, frame drifts like a helicopter idling. A yellow graphic line tracks the main road ending with big red "X" at the lava pool. Then a yellow line tracks the side road ending in a green check mark.
panels.action_es: POV del helicóptero, el cuadro flota. Una línea gráfica amarilla marca el camino principal con una "X" roja sobre la pileta de lava. Después otra línea amarilla marca el camino lateral con una tilde verde.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): Aimee, the main road is blocked by a lava pool, you have to turn right now!

panels.description: Aimee in Stock Car, wrenching the steering wheel and drifting. Huge plume of dirt and tire smoke on the right. INSET: CU of Charmaine, eyes wide, nervous.
panels.description_es: Aimee en el Stock Car, manoteando el volante y derrapando. Enorme nube de polvo y humo a la derecha. INSET: CU de Charmaine con los ojos muy abiertos, nerviosa.
panels.action: Aimee's Stock Car slides in left to right, pushing a cloud of dirt and tire smoke. INSET: Charmaine CU trails after the sliding car.
panels.action_es: El Stock Car de Aimee derrapa de izquierda a derecha empujando una nube de polvo y humo. INSET: CU de Charmaine siguiendo al auto.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): AaaHHH! / Charmaine (V.O.): Everyone follow Aimee! / Ted (V.O.): (as announcer) In a bizarre twist, one of the racers is now directing the race... from the air!

panels.description: Composite of Crosby, Sean and Ted all doing the same drift maneuver as Aimee did, at the same angle.
panels.description_es: Composite de Crosby, Sean y Ted haciendo la misma maniobra de derrape que hizo Aimee, y en el mismo ángulo.
panels.action: The images of the racers stack vertically by sliding in left to right.
panels.action_es: Las imágenes de los corredores se apilan verticalmente deslizándose de izquierda a derecha.
panels.voiceover: Crosby / Sean / Ted (V.O.): AaaHHH!

panels.description: The four racers speed down the mountain side road. Aimee and Sean are neck and neck.
panels.description_es: Los cuatro corredores bajan a toda velocidad por el camino lateral. Aimee y Sean par a par.
panels.action: Pan and push in on the speeding racers.
panels.action_es: Paneo y push in sobre los corredores a toda velocidad.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): Thanks, Charmaine!

panels.description: A collapsed, old wooden mountain bridge. INSET 40B: CU on Aimee's surprised face. INSET 40C: CU on Charmaine's surprised face.
panels.description_es: Un viejo puente de madera colapsado en la montaña. INSET 40B: CU de la cara sorprendida de Aimee. INSET 40C: CU de la cara sorprendida de Charmaine.
panels.action: Several pop-zooms around the collapsed bridge highlight its brokenness. One pop zoom is so harsh it knocks a piece loose. INSETS pop up on either side.
panels.action_es: Varios pop-zooms alrededor del puente colapsado resaltan lo roto. Un pop-zoom tan fuerte afloja un pedazo. Los INSET aparecen a los lados.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): Don't thank me yet. The bridge at the end of the trail is out! You'll have to jump it.

panels.description: All four vehicles jumping the collapsed bridge. They form an arc across the gap. Aimee's Stock Car, Sean's Mustang, Crosby's Porsche, Ted's Scrambler.
panels.description_es: Los cuatro vehículos saltando el puente colapsado. Forman un arco sobre el hueco. Stock Car de Aimee, Mustang de Sean, Porsche de Crosby, Scrambler de Ted.
panels.action: Show each of the four vehicles jumping the collapsed bridge using four positions.
panels.action_es: Mostrar cada uno de los cuatro vehículos saltando el puente colapsado en cuatro posiciones.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): Whoo-hoo! / Sean (V.O.): Yahoo! / Crosby (V.O.): Oh boy! / Ted (V.O.): Don't look down!

panels.description: Stock Car, Mustang, Porsche and Triumph angled as if they just skidded to a stop. Dust plumes behind them. In foreground, side view of the helicopter with the treasure chest next to it. INSET: CU on Charmaine in cockpit, smiling and pumping her fist.
panels.description_es: Stock Car, Mustang, Porsche y Triumph en ángulo como si acabaran de derrapar hasta detenerse. Polvo detrás. En primer plano, vista lateral del helicóptero con el cofre al lado. INSET: CU de Charmaine en la cabina festejando.
panels.action: The four cars come into frame one at a time in finish order: Aimee, Sean, Crosby, Ted. INSET: Charmaine rocks back and forth cheering.
panels.action_es: Los cuatro autos entran al cuadro en orden: Aimee, Sean, Crosby, Ted. INSET: Charmaine celebra.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): Yes! Way to go! / Ted (V.O.): (as announcer) At the finish line, it's Aimee for the win, then Sean, then Crosby, then me. Hmm, well, at least everyone is safe and the treasure saved! Whew!

panels.description: Four-tiered champion's podium made of stone with lava flowing around it. On top: Aimee in Stock Car and Charmaine in helicopter. In front of them, an open and overflowing treasure chest. Behind them, the giant volcano.
panels.description_es: Podio de campeones de cuatro escalones de piedra con lava fluyendo alrededor. En el podio superior, Aimee en su Stock Car y Charmaine en su helicóptero. Frente a ellas un cofre abierto rebosante de tesoro. Detrás, el volcán gigante.
panels.action: Slow push in. The lava moves around the podium as the cars flash their lights in celebration.
panels.action_es: Push in lento. La lava fluye alrededor del podio mientras los autos destellan sus luces celebrando.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): You definitely earned that race trophy today, Aimee. / Aimee (V.O.): And you recovered the treasure. We both win. / Ted (V.O.): Um, Charmaine. You're gonna fly us all out of here, right?

panels.description: The vehicles from this adventure are parked in front of the DIY volcano on a cardboard podium. The kids are near the playset with Aimee and Charmaine in the middle high-fiving.
panels.description_es: Los vehículos de esta aventura estacionados frente al volcán DIY sobre un podio de cartón. Los chicos cerca del playset, con Aimee y Charmaine en el medio chocando los cinco.
panels.action: Aimee and Charmaine's hands smack together.
panels.action_es: Las manos de Aimee y Charmaine chocan.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): Now that's an adventure!

panels.description: The kids stand side-by-side behind the play area smiling, from right to left: Charmaine, Aimee, Sean, Ted, Crosby. Each character holds a vehicle from the adventure with their outside hand. Charmaine the Rescue Helicopter, Aimee the Chevy Stock Car, Sean the Rover 6x6, Ted the Triumph Scrambler, Crosby the Polaris RZR.
panels.description_es: Los chicos lado a lado detrás del área de juego, sonriendo. De derecha a izquierda: Charmaine, Aimee, Sean, Ted, Crosby. Cada uno sostiene un vehículo de la aventura con su mano exterior. Charmaine el Rescue Helicopter, Aimee el Chevy Stock Car, Sean el Rover 6x6, Ted el Triumph Scrambler, Crosby el Polaris RZR.
panels.action: In rapid succession the arms holding the vehicles rise into position. As the last one hits its mark we slowly pull out.
panels.action_es: En rápida sucesión los brazos con los vehículos se alzan a su posición. Cuando el último llega nos alejamos lentamente.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Nothing can stop the... / All (V.O.): MATCHBOX CREW!

panels.description: MWS 3/4 angle on highway. Crosby drives the F-650 Rollback with the Rover 6x6 behind. Von Steele's Durango explodes out of a sand dune on the far right.
panels.description_es: Plano general 3/4 de la autopista. Crosby maneja el F-650 Rollback con el Rover 6x6 detrás. El Durango de Von Steele explota desde una duna a la derecha.
panels.action: Sand sprays to reveal the Durango as it bursts from a sand dune and lands next to the F-650 Rollback.
panels.action_es: Arena salpica revelando al Durango al salir de la duna y aterrizar junto al F-650.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Shooting out of a sand dune, Von Steele surprises Sean and Crosby transporting a new high-tech car.

panels.description: WS high angle. Durango and F-650 race side by side. Behind them, Rover stopped perpendicular to the road. INSET: CU Sean surprised at the wheel.
panels.description_es: Plano general. Durango y F-650 corren par a par. Detrás, el Rover detenido perpendicular al camino. INSET: CU de Sean sorprendido al volante.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. Durango and F-650 move towards camera. INSET: Sean's hands wrench the steering wheel, eyes wide.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. Durango y F-650 avanzan hacia cámara. INSET: manos de Sean aferradas al volante, ojos abiertos.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): The sand makes Sean spin out! (as Sean) Whoooa! (then) Watch out Crosby, Von Steele is coming for you!

panels.description: Matchbox Crew logo with episode title "Highway Heroes!" Title graphics zip into position.
panels.description_es: Logo de Matchbox Crew con el título del episodio "Highway Heroes!" Los gráficos entran al cuadro.
panels.action: The title zips into position as Sean says the episode title. SFX: whoosh.
panels.action_es: El título entra con velocidad. SFX: whoosh.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Matchbox Crew's Highway Heroes!

panels.description: INT. Smalley's Garage. Composite — five vertical columns. Ted holds the Blaze Blaster III. Sean holds the Rover 6x6. Aimee holds the Mercedes Sprinter Ambulance. Crosby holds the F-650 Rollback. Charmaine holds the Rescue Helicopter.
panels.description_es: INT. Garage de Smalley. Composite — cinco columnas verticales. Ted con Blaze Blaster. Sean con Rover 6x6. Aimee con Ambulancia Sprinter. Crosby con F-650. Charmaine con Helicóptero.
panels.action: Five hero singles stack vertically to form a split-screen of the whole team.
panels.action_es: Cinco singles se apilan verticalmente formando un split-screen del equipo completo.
panels.voiceover: GFX: Character names splash over each image. SFX: fire engine siren, ambulance siren, horn honk, helicopter rotor.

panels.description: INT. Smalley's Garage. CU table level — Sean and Crosby peer over the table edge. Sean's right hand pushes the Durango. Crosby's left hand pulls the F-650 with Nismo stacked on top.
panels.description_es: INT. Garage de Smalley. CU nivel mesa — Sean y Crosby asoman sobre el borde. La mano de Sean empuja el Durango; la de Crosby hala el F-650 con el Nismo apilado.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. Sean (wearing Von Steele eyepatch) pushes Durango. Crosby pulls F-650 with Nissan Nismo stacked on it. Both cars move right to left during zoom out.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. Sean (con parche de Von Steele) empuja el Durango. Crosby hala el F-650 con el Nismo encima. Los dos autos se mueven de derecha a izquierda.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): (cars) vroom. Sean (V.O.): Von Steele is gaining on the transport truck. In the middle of the desert, there's no escape.

panels.description: INT. Smalley's Garage. WS 20° high angle over the DIY desert table — real sand, paper date palms and acacias. Sean points at the F-650, Nismo and Durango with one hand, Rover with the other.
panels.description_es: INT. Garage de Smalley. Plano general 20° en picado sobre la mesa DIY de desierto con arena real, palmeras y acacias de papel. Sean señala los vehículos con ambas manos.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. Kids' heads lean forward. Sean's arms move towards the vehicles.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. Las cabezas de los chicos se inclinan hacia adelante. Los brazos de Sean apuntan a los vehículos.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): Is that truck carrying that car? Sean (V.O.): Yeah, that's the high-tech car. Crosby (V.O.): And the truck is struggling because it's like two hundred degrees in the desert.

panels.description: INT. Smalley's Garage. MS table level. Sean holds the Durango with his left hand and the Rover with his right, demonstrating the pursuit.
panels.description_es: INT. Garage de Smalley. Plano medio 3/4. Sean sostiene el Durango en su mano izquierda y el Rover en la derecha, demostrando la persecución.
panels.action: A>B. Sean moves the Rover until even with the Durango. Match-cut to...
panels.action_es: A>B. Sean mueve el Rover hasta emparejarlo con el Durango. Match-cut a...
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): And then the Rover is back here trying to catch up.

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. MS 3/4 street level. Rover and Durango side by side — the Rover bumps the Durango and they exchange grinding sparks.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. Plano medio 3/4 nivel calle. Durango y Rover par a par — se golpean lateralmente produciendo chispas.
panels.action: A>B. The Rover slides in and bumps the Durango. A flare of sparks as they hit. The Durango slides back and bumps the Rover.
panels.action_es: A>B. El Rover se acerca y golpea al Durango. Ráfaga de chispas. El Durango se desliza y golpea al Rover de vuelta.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): You can't outrun me Von Steele. (as Von Steele) Maybe not, but I can outdrive you.

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. MS 20° low angle. Tires and front bumpers of Durango and Rover fill left and right sides of frame. Explosion of sand in the middle.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. Plano medio 20° contrapicado. Los neumáticos y parachoques del Durango y el Rover llenan los lados del cuadro. Explosión de arena en el centro.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. Tires of both vehicles spin. Sand explosion spreads between them.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. Los neumáticos de ambos autos giran. Explosión de arena entre ellos.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Von Steele forces Sean onto a side road full of dangers.

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. WS 45° high angle from behind. A series of sand mounds in a row. Both cars weave through them.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. WS 45° picado desde atrás. Una serie de montículos de arena en fila. Ambos autos serpentean entre ellos.
panels.action: A>B. The two cars weave through a series of sand mounds in a row.
panels.action_es: A>B. Los dos autos serpentean entre una fila de dunas de arena.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Sean tries to keep up with Von Steele as they weave through massive sand dunes.

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. MS split screen. 11A: Looking through Rover's windshield at date palm trees. 11B: CU reverse of Sean surprised, wrenching the steering wheel.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. Plano medio en pantalla dividida. 11A: Vista a través del parabrisas del Rover — palmeras datileras. 11B: CU de Sean sorprendido, aferrado al volante.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. 11A: Sand mounds slide left to reveal date palm view through windshield. 11B: Sean's surprised face slides into frame.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. 11A: Los montículos se deslizan revelando palmeras por el parabrisas. 11B: La cara sorprendida de Sean entra al cuadro.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Sean rounds a sand dune expecting to see Von Steele, but instead finds date palms!

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. MS. Back of the Rover mid-air, tilted slightly. Highway and Von Steele's Durango visible below.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. PM trasero del Rover a media altura en el aire, levemente inclinado. Debajo se ve la autopista y el Durango de Von Steele.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. Frame sinks and pushes in as if the Rover is soaring and coming in for a landing. Highway and Durango visible under the Rover.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. El cuadro desciende y hace push in como si el Rover sobrevolara y aterrizara. La autopista y el Durango se ven bajo el Rover.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Sean swerves and jumps a sand dune to get back onto the highway.

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. WS through Sean's windshield. Von Steele's Durango on the side of the road. Crosby dressed as truck driver waves a bandana.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. WS a través del parabrisas de Sean. El Durango de Von Steele al costado de la ruta. Crosby disfrazado de camionero agita una bandana.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. Zoom in on the Durango. Crosby (dressed as truck driver) pops on screen waving a bandana.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. Zoom al Durango. Crosby (disfrazado de camionero) aparece en pantalla agitando una bandana.
panels.voiceover: Ted (V.O.): But he sees Von Steele's Durango on the side of the road. And the truck driver is next to it.

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. MS straight forward. Von Steele behind the wheel of the F-650 Rollback, mean smirk on his face.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. PM recto. Von Steele al volante del F-650 Rollback con una sonrisa maliciosa.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. Von Steele rocks with the motion of the truck as he speeds along. Mean smirk on his face.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. Von Steele se balancea con el movimiento del camión. Sonrisa maléfica.
panels.voiceover: Ted (V.O.): Von Steele stole the truck carrying the high-tech car.

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. WS. Von Steele drives the F-650 with wild fear — pop from MS to WS reveals a dangerous cliffside mountain road.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. WS. Von Steele maneja el F-650 con cara de terror. Se revela que está en un camino de montaña junto a un precipicio.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. Von Steele grips the steering wheel side to side as frame slides left and right. Pop from MS to WS to reveal truck on dangerous mountain road.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. Von Steele agarra el volante de lado a lado. Pop de PM a PG revelando el camino de montaña peligroso.
panels.voiceover: Ted (V.O.): But, oh no! The brakes on the truck went out... on the cliffside mountain road.

panels.description: INT. Smalley's Garage. MS. Sean stands with arms crossed next to Ted, who is bent at table level sliding the F-650 side to side.
panels.description_es: INT. Garage de Smalley. PM. Sean de brazos cruzados junto a Ted, que está inclinado sobre la mesa haciendo deslizar el F-650 de lado a lado.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. Ted slides the F-650 from side to side as if it is swerving.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. Ted desliza el F-650 de lado a lado simulando que derrapa.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Wait! Ted, this is a spy mission where we stop Von Steele! Ted (V.O.): And with no brakes, we'd better stop him quickly.

panels.description: INT. Smalley's Garage. WS. Charmaine and Crosby place a large cardboard box. Aimee leans a flat cardboard piece on it. Ted places the F-650 on top — building a mountain.
panels.description_es: INT. Garage de Smalley. WS. Charmaine y Crosby colocan una caja de cartón grande. Aimee apoya cartón plano como rampa. Ted pone el F-650 encima — construyendo una montaña.
panels.action: A>B. Three layers move one at a time: Crosby and Charmaine lower the box, Aimee leans the cardboard, Ted lowers the F-650 on top.
panels.action_es: A>B. Tres capas se mueven una a la vez: Crosby y Charmaine bajan la caja, Aimee apoya el cartón, Ted baja el F-650 encima.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): And now there's also a mountain? Ted (V.O.): Yeah. Tizi n'Tichka pass in Morocco. Veeery dangerous. Crosby/Charmaine/Aimee (V.O.): (dramatic gasp)

panels.description: INT. Smalley's Garage. MWS kid level. Ted, Charmaine, Crosby and Aimee hold their rescue vehicles — Triumph Scrambler, Rescue Helicopter, Blaze Blaster III, Mercedes Sprinter Ambulance. Sean smiles facing them with the Rover 6x6.
panels.description_es: INT. Garage de Smalley. MWS nivel chicos. Ted, Charmaine, Crosby y Aimee sostienen sus vehículos de rescate. Sean sonríe frente a ellos con el Rover 6x6.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. Every arm holding a vehicle moves. The vehicles and Sean's face converge in frame.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. Cada brazo que sostiene un vehículo se mueve. Los vehículos y la cara de Sean convergen.
panels.voiceover: Ted (V.O.): The question is, can we catch Von Steele AND rescue the truck? Sean (V.O.): Okay. Let's do it!

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. WS. Ted on Triumph Scrambler leads the Mercedes Sprinter Ambulance, Rover 6x6 and Blaze Blaster III racing down the highway. Red emergency light on Ted's helmet.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. WS de frente al equipo. Ted en la Triumph Scrambler lidera la Ambulancia Sprinter, el Rover 6x6 y el Blaze Blaster. Luz roja de emergencia en el casco de Ted.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. Frame shakes with race energy as vehicles move toward camera. Lights on Ted's helmet, Ambulance and Blaze Blaster spin and flash.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. El cuadro vibra con energía de carrera mientras los vehículos avanzan hacia cámara. Las luces de emergencia giran y destellan.
panels.voiceover: Ted (V.O.): I'll get out in front of the truck. Sean (V.O.): Crosby and I will get on either side. Aimee (V.O.): And I'll bring up the rear.

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. WS high angle. Rover 6x6 and Blaze Blaster III flank the F-650. Ted on Triumph pulls even with the cab. INSET: CU empty cab interior.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. WS picado. Rover 6x6 y Blaze Blaster III flanquean el F-650. Ted en Triumph se acerca a la cabina. INSET: CU interior de la cabina vacía.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. F-650 drifts side to side. Rover and Blaze Blaster match moves. Triumph moves even with cab. INSET: Pop zoom on empty cab interior.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. El F-650 derrapa de lado a lado. Rover y Blaze Blaster igualan sus movimientos. Triumph alcanza la cabina. INSET: Pop zoom al interior vacío.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Whoa! Where did Von Steele learn how to drive! He's all over the place. Ted (V.O.): He's not driving. The cab is empty. NO ONE is driving!

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. MWS side view. F-650 Rollback and Ambulance. Nismo launches mid-air over the Ambulance. INSET: Von Steele in the Nismo, gritted teeth.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. MWS lateral. F-650 Rollback y Ambulancia. El Nismo despega en el aire sobre la Ambulancia. INSET: Von Steele al volante del Nismo.
panels.action: A>B. Nissan Nismo launches off the flatbed of the F-650 and soars over the Ambulance. INSET: CU Von Steele gritted teeth driving the Nismo.
panels.action_es: A>B. El Nissan Nismo despega del flatbed del F-650 y vuela sobre la Ambulancia. INSET: CU de Von Steele con los dientes apretados.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Von Steele got in the car on the back of the truck and is stealing it! Aimee (V.O.): Yikes!

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. MS 3/4 street level. Aimee in the Ambulance wrenching the steering wheel to one side, beginning the pursuit of Von Steele.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. PM 3/4 nivel calle. Aimee en la Ambulancia Sprinter girando el volante, iniciando la persecución de Von Steele.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. Ambulance drifts through the frame. Blurred world behind Aimee wrenching the steering wheel.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. La Ambulancia derrapa por el cuadro. El mundo borroso detrás de Aimee girando el volante.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): I'll chase down Von Steele. You guys stop that runaway truck.

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. WS aerial from Rescue Helicopter. F-650 and rescue vehicles in the middle. A Mercedes Actros Cab headed straight at them.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. WS picado desde el Helicóptero de Rescate. En el frente, el F-650 y los vehículos de rescate. Un Mercedes Actros Cab viene de frente.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. Helicopter hovers in foreground vibrating. Mercedes Actros Cab headed straight for the F-650 and rescue vehicles.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. El helicóptero vibra en primer plano. El Mercedes Actros se dirige directamente hacia el F-650 y los vehículos de rescate.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): There is a massive semi headed your way!

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. MS 45° high angle. Rover 6x6 bumping the F-650 Rollback to keep it in lane. Sparks at the impact point.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. PM 45° picado. El Rover 6x6 golpea al F-650 Rollback para mantenerlo en carril. Chispas en el punto de impacto.
panels.action: A>B. Rover slides over toward the F-650. When it hits: sparks fly at the impact point.
panels.action_es: A>B. El Rover se desliza hacia el F-650. Al impactar: chispas en el punto de contacto.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Sean bumps the truck to keep it from drifting into the wrong lane.

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. MS 20° high angle facing F-650 as the Mercedes Actros Cab passes. Trucks inches apart. INSET: Three CU hero singles of Ted, Sean and Crosby, eyes wide with fear.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. PM 20° picado. El F-650 y el Mercedes Actros se pasan a centímetros. INSET: CU de terror en los rostros de Ted, Sean y Crosby.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. Image shakes with thin speed lines. INSET: Three hero singles of Ted, Sean and Crosby pop on in a row — eyes wide, gripping wheel/handlebars.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. El cuadro tiembla con líneas de velocidad. INSET: Tres singles de Ted, Sean y Crosby aparecen en fila — ojos abiertos, aferrados a volantes y manubrio.
panels.voiceover: Ted (V.O.): The two trucks miss each other by inches! Sean (V.O.): That was way too close.

panels.description: INT. Smalley's Garage. MS kid level. Aimee taps Sean on the shoulder with a smile. He looks back.
panels.description_es: INT. Garage de Smalley. PM nivel chicos. Aimee toca el hombro de Sean con una sonrisa. Él la mira hacia atrás.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. Aimee's hand taps on Sean's shoulder. He looks over his shoulder at her with a smile.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. La mano de Aimee golpea el hombro de Sean. Él mira hacia atrás con una sonrisa.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): (playful) Excuse me. Von Steele is escaping.

panels.description: INT. Smalley's Garage. MS over Aimee's shoulder at table level. Aimee pushes the Ambulance toward Sean who holds the Nismo at the far end.
panels.description_es: INT. Garage de Smalley. PM sobre el hombro de Aimee a nivel mesa. Aimee empuja la Ambulancia hacia Sean, que sostiene el Nismo al otro extremo.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. Push zoom supports the motion of Aimee's car. Sean holds the Nismo at the far end of the table.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. Push zoom acompaña el movimiento de la Ambulancia. Sean sostiene el Nismo al otro extremo de la mesa.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): Let's see what this Ambulance can do!

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. MS 3/4 side. Von Steele in the Nismo with an evil smile. INSET: Aimee in the Ambulance giving a one-handed howdy wave — a surprise entrance.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. PM 3/4 lateral. Von Steele en el Nismo con sonrisa maliciosa. INSET: Aimee en la Ambulancia haciendo señas con la mano.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. Nismo shimmies at speed with speed lines all around. INSET: Aimee pops up with a one-handed howdy wave from the Ambulance — a surprise entrance.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. El Nismo vibra a toda velocidad con líneas de movimiento. INSET: Aimee aparece con un saludo de una mano desde la Ambulancia.
panels.voiceover: Sean (as Von Steele)(V.O.): (evil laugh) Another perfect crime. Brilliant and flawless. Those fools will never catch me. Aimee (V.O.): Hi there!

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. WS 3/4 side. Nismo and Ambulance angled toward each other at 45°. Tire smoke and dust. Bumpers stop inches apart — Von Steele captured.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. WS 3/4 lateral. Nismo y Ambulancia enfrentados en ángulo de 45°. Humo y polvo. Parachoques a centímetros de distancia — Von Steele atrapado.
panels.action: Tire smoke and dust flies as the Nismo and Ambulance bumpers stop inches from each other at a 45-degree angle.
panels.action_es: Humo y polvo mientras los parachoques del Nismo y la Ambulancia se detienen a centímetros entre sí en ángulo de 45°.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): Aimee speeds around Von Steele and uses the Ambulance to force him to stop. Sean (as Von Steele): (frustrated) Impossible! How did you catch me? Aimee (V.O.): Don't feel bad. I'm just that good at going fast.

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. WS aerial from Rescue Helicopter. In the background: a sharp turn in the road right next to the cliff's edge. (Script typo: originally labelled Panel 29 — corrected to 29B.)
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. WS picado desde el Helicóptero de Rescate. En el fondo, una curva pronunciada junto al borde del precipicio. (Nota: panel numerado 29B en el guion — typo del script original.)
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. Zoom under the Rescue Helicopter toward the cliff's edge with a sharp turn in the road.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. Zoom bajo el Helicóptero hacia el borde del precipicio con una curva pronunciada en el camino.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): From the air, the Rescue Helicopter spots a sharp turn in the road ahead. (dialogue) If we don't stop that truck soon it's going to go over the cliff!

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. MS 20° high angle. Looking over the Blaze Blaster III behind the F-650. Fire engine ladder extended over the F-650's flatbed. The tow hook rips through rung after rung — wood splinters everywhere.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. PM 20° picado. El Blaze Blaster III detrás del F-650 con su escalera extendida sobre el flatbed. El gancho del camión desgarra los peldaños — astillas por todos lados.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. Fire engine lights flash. Splinters of wood fly as the tow hook of the F-650 tears through rung after rung of the Blaze Blaster's extended ladder.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. Las luces del camión destellan. Astillas de madera vuelan cuando el gancho del F-650 destroza peldaño a peldaño de la escalera extendida.
panels.voiceover: Crosby (V.O.): Maybe the ladder on this fire engine can slow it down. (beat) Nope.

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. WS side. Rescue Helicopter tilted back with a taut hook rope attached to the F-650's tow hook. Pulling the runaway truck.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. WS lateral. El Helicóptero de Rescate inclinado hacia atrás con un cable tenso enganchado al gancho del F-650, tirando del camión.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. Helicopter rope and tow hook rope quiver with tension. Tire smoke billows from the F-650 as it slows.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. El cable del helicóptero vibra con tensión. Humo de neumáticos del F-650 al frenarse.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): Never send a truck to do a helicopter's job. Ted (V.O.): It's working!

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. MWS street level. F-650 tilted after front right tire hits a rock. INSET 32B: CU tire hitting rock with stress lines. INSET 32C: CU helicopter hook releasing from the tow hook.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. MWS nivel calle. F-650 inclinado tras que el neumático delantero golpea una roca. INSET 32B: CU neumático chocando la roca con líneas de estrés. INSET 32C: CU gancho del helicóptero soltándose del camión.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. Push in as the truck tilts. INSETS zoom out from impact points — tire hitting rock; hook releasing from tow hook.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. Push in mientras el camión se inclina. Los INSET hacen zoom desde los puntos de impacto — neumático en roca; gancho soltándose.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): But suddenly the tire hits a huge rock. Unhooking the helicopter and sending the truck into a spin!

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. MWS street level. Triumph, Rover 6x6 and Blaze Blaster facing the F-650 which rolls backwards down the highway toward the cliff.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. MWS nivel calle. La Triumph, el Rover 6x6 y el Blaze Blaster de frente. El F-650 rueda hacia atrás rumbo al precipicio.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. Triumph, Rover and Blaze Blaster face the F-650 which rolls backwards away from them.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. Triumph, Rover y Blaze Blaster de frente al F-650 que rueda hacia atrás alejándose.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): The massive out of control truck is now speeding backwards down the highway. Charmaine (V.O.): And careening towards a cliff!

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. MS street level. Ambulance and Rover 6x6 side by side. Aimee drives the Ambulance. Von Steele is tied up in the passenger seat. Sean looks over from the Rover.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. PM nivel calle. Ambulancia y Rover 6x6 lado a lado. Aimee maneja la Ambulancia. Von Steele atado en el asiento del pasajero. Sean mira desde el Rover.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. Ambulance and Rover move toward camera together. Von Steele is tied up in the Ambulance passenger seat.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. Ambulancia y Rover avanzan hacia cámara. Von Steele está atado en el asiento del copiloto de la Ambulancia.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): There's no way to stop this thing! Aimee (V.O.): Hey, if I can catch Von Steele, you can figure out a way to stop that truck. Sean: You captured Von Steele! Aimee (V.O.): You can do this, Sean!

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. CU street level. Rover 6x6 front bumper to front bumper with the F-650. The winch hook latches under the truck's bumper.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. CU nivel calle. El Rover 6x6 parachoques con parachoques frente al F-650. El gancho del cabrestante se engancha bajo el parachoques del camión.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. The winch hook flips into place. Rover front bumper to front bumper with the F-650.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. El gancho del cabrestante encaja. El Rover queda parachoques con parachoques frente al F-650.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Encouraged by his friends, Sean hooks the winch from his 6x6 to the front of the truck. Aimee/Ted/Crosby/Charmaine (V.O.): You got this, Sean!

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. WS side view road level. Metal winch line stretches from the Rover 6x6 (left) to the F-650 (right). Tire smoke billows from both vehicles.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. WS lateral nivel camino. El cable metálico del cabrestante se tensa entre el Rover 6x6 (izquierda) y el F-650 (derecha). Humo de neumáticos.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. Frame shakes with tension. Tire smoke billows from both vehicles.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. El cuadro vibra con tensión. Humo de neumáticos de ambos vehículos.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Sean slams on the brakes and the winch cable jerks taut.

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway cliff. EWS high side angle. The Rover and F-650, linked by winch cable, slide dangerously close to the sharp turn at the cliff's edge.
panels.description_es: EXT. Precipicio. Gran plano general ángulo lateral alto. El Rover y el F-650, unidos por el cable del cabrestante, se acercan peligrosamente a la curva junto al precipicio.
panels.action: A>B. The linked vehicles slide dangerously close to the sharp turn at the cliff's edge. Smoke and dust kick up.
panels.action_es: A>B. Los vehículos enganchados se deslizan peligrosamente hacia la curva en el borde del precipicio. Humo y polvo.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Ahh-ahh-ahh-ahh-ahh.

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway cliff. MS street level. The back tires of the F-650 hang over the cliff. INSET: CU Sean, two hands on the wheel, face determined.
panels.description_es: EXT. Precipicio. PM nivel calle. Los neumáticos traseros del F-650 cuelgan sobre el borde del precipicio. INSET: CU de Sean con las dos manos en el volante, cara determinada.
panels.action: A>B. The F-650's back tires slide up to the cliff edge and drop over. Rock and dust fall over the edge. INSET: Sean with two hands on wheel, face determined, frame shaking.
