panels.action_es: A>B. Los neumáticos traseros del F-650 llegan al borde y cuelgan sobre el precipicio. Rocas y polvo caen. INSET: Sean con dos manos en el volante, cara determinada.
panels.voiceover: Ted (V.O.): The huge truck barely stops at the cliff's edge.

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. MS car level. Facing Aimee and Von Steele (tied up) in the Ambulance as they watch the truck situation.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. PM nivel auto. Aimee y Von Steele (atado) en la Ambulancia observan la situación del camión.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. Slow push in on Aimee and Von Steele in the Ambulance.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. Push in lento hacia Aimee y Von Steele en la Ambulancia.
panels.voiceover: Aimee (V.O.): You did it. Sean (as Von Steele)(V.O.): Ha! That truck is still moving.

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway cliff. WS side view car level. F-650 hanging vertically over the cliff, held only by the Rover 6x6's winch cable. Rover being dragged toward the edge.
panels.description_es: EXT. Precipicio. WS lateral nivel auto. El F-650 cuelga verticalmente sobre el precipicio, sostenido solo por el cable del cabrestante del Rover 6x6. El Rover es arrastrado hacia el borde.
panels.action: A>B. F-650 tilts and slides over the cliff. The Rover is pulled forward toward the edge. F-650 ends up dangling vertically over the cliff by the winch cable.
panels.action_es: A>B. El F-650 se inclina y cae sobre el precipicio. El Rover es arrastrado hacia el borde. El F-650 queda colgando verticalmente del cable del cabrestante.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): The truck is too heavy. It pulls the Rover towards the cliff's edge. (as Sean) I can't make it stop!

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. CU street level. A hook from Charmaine's Rescue Helicopter attaches to the back bumper of the Rover 6x6.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. CU nivel calle. Un gancho del Helicóptero de Rescate de Charmaine se engancha en el parachoques trasero del Rover 6x6.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. A hook flips into place on the back bumper of the Rover 6x6.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. Un gancho encaja en el parachoques trasero del Rover 6x6.
panels.voiceover: Charmaine (V.O.): Not so fast.

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. WS. Rescue Helicopter angled up, taut rope to Rover, which pulls the F-650 back from the cliff. INSET: CU Charmaine in cockpit, gritting teeth, pulling the cyclic stick.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. WS. Helicóptero de Rescate inclinado hacia arriba, su cuerda tensa al Rover, que a su vez jala el F-650 de vuelta desde el precipicio. INSET: Charmaine en la cabina, determinada.
panels.action: A>B. Rescue Helicopter, Rover 6x6 and F-650 Rollback all move as one. F-650 is pulled back up onto the road. INSET: CU Charmaine in cockpit, gritting her teeth, pulling the cyclic stick.
panels.action_es: A>B. Helicóptero, Rover y F-650 se mueven como uno. El F-650 es jalado de vuelta a la carretera. INSET: CU de Charmaine en la cabina, dientes apretados, jalando el cíclico.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): The Rescue Helicopter and Rover 6x6, working together, pull the truck safely back on to the road. (as Sean) Thank you, Charmaine.

panels.description: EXT. Desert Highway. WS. Rescue Helicopter landing near Rover, Triumph and Blaze Blaster. Aimee waves and points down the road at Von Steele escaping in the Ambulance. Dust and wind from the helicopter.
panels.description_es: EXT. Autopista del Desierto. WS. El Helicóptero aterriza cerca del Rover, la Triumph y el Blaze Blaster. Aimee agita la mano y señala la Ambulancia de Von Steele escapando.
panels.action: CONSTANT MOTION. Wind blows dust and trees as Rescue Helicopter lands. Aimee waves one hand and points down the road. Ambulance driving away in background.
panels.action_es: CONSTANT MOTION. El viento mueve el polvo y los árboles mientras el Helicóptero aterriza. Aimee agita una mano y señala la carretera. La Ambulancia se aleja al fondo.
panels.voiceover: Ted/Sean/Crosby (V.O.): Whoo-hoo! Way to go Charmaine. You saved the day! Aimee (V.O.): (shouting) Hey! Hey! Hey, crew! Von Steele escaped and stole the Ambulance.

panels.description: INT. Smalley's Garage. WS table level. Kids all leaned back and laughing. In the foreground, the Mercedes Sprinter Ambulance toy rolls toward camera.
panels.description_es: INT. Garage de Smalley. WS nivel mesa. Los chicos inclinados hacia atrás riéndose. En el primer plano, la Mercedes Sprinter Ambulancia rueda hacia cámara.
panels.action: Kids wave back and forth with laughter. The Ambulance toy rolls toward camera.
panels.action_es: Los chicos se mecen de lado a lado con risas. El juguete de la Ambulancia rueda hacia cámara.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Forget about Von Steele. That was fun!

panels.description: INT. Smalley's Garage. MWS 20° high angle. Kids stand side-by-side behind the play area, from right to left: Charmaine (Rescue Helicopter), Aimee (Mercedes Sprinter), Sean (Rover 6x6), Ted (Triumph Scrambler), Crosby (Blaze Blaster III). Vehicles raised.
panels.description_es: INT. Garage de Smalley. MWS 20° en picado. Los chicos lado a lado detrás del área de juego. De derecha a izquierda: Charmaine (Helicóptero de Rescate), Aimee (Ambulancia Sprinter), Sean (Rover 6x6), Ted (Triumph Scrambler), Crosby (Blaze Blaster III).
panels.action: In rapid succession the arms holding the vehicles rise into position. As the last one hits its mark we slowly pull out.
panels.action_es: En rápida sucesión los brazos con los vehículos se alzan a su posición. Cuando el último llega nos alejamos lentamente.
panels.voiceover: Sean (V.O.): Nothing can stop the... / All (V.O.): MATCHBOX CREW!
